```{r S-TRAC validation}
clinmore$recur<-(clinmore$EVENTYP=="Disease Recurrence or occurrence of a Secondary Malignancy")
clinmore$recurtime<-ifelse(clinmore$recur,
                           ifelse(clinmore$EEVALUED<365,"early",
                                  ifelse(clinmore$EEVALUED<1095,"mod","lateish")),NA
                           )
clinmore$id <- sub("^A6181109\\s+", "", clinmore$row_id)

#subset to recurrences only
clinmores<-clinmore[clinmore$EVENTYP=="Disease Recurrence or occurrence of a Secondary Malignancy"&!is.na(clinmore$EVENTYP),]


TPMz$angio <- rowMedians(
  as.matrix(TPMz[, colnames(TPMz) %in% angio])
)


TPMz$teff <- rowMedians(
  as.matrix(TPMz[, colnames(TPMz) %in% teff])
)

TPMz$myeloid <- rowMedians(
  as.matrix(TPMz[, colnames(TPMz) %in% myeloid])
)


TPMz$stroma <- rowMedians(
  as.matrix(TPMz[, colnames(TPMz) %in% stroma])
)


TPMz$cellcycle <- rowMedians(
  as.matrix(TPMz[, colnames(TPMz) %in% cellcycle])
)


TPMz$emt <- rowSums(
  as.matrix(TPMz[, colnames(TPMz) %in% emt])
)


clinmores$angio<-TPMz$angio[match(clinmores$id,rownames(TPMz))]
clinmores$cellcycle<-TPMz$cellcycle[match(clinmores$id,rownames(TPMz))]
clinmores$teff<-TPMz$teff[match(clinmores$id,rownames(TPMz))]
clinmores$myeloid<-TPMz$myeloid[match(clinmores$id,rownames(TPMz))]
clinmores$stroma<-TPMz$stroma[match(clinmores$id,rownames(TPMz))]
clinmores$emt<-TPMz$emt[match(clinmores$id,rownames(TPMz))]
clinmores$time<-clinmores$EEVALUEM #months

##angio figure
fit <- lm(angio ~ time, data = clinmores)
summary(fit)
cbind(
  coef(fit),
  confint(fit)
)

anova(fit, test= "LRT")


p_label <- "p = 0.035"

summary(fit)

angiostraccont <- ggplot(clinmores, aes(x = time, y = angio)) +
    geom_point(alpha = 0.7,colour="#4d9221") +
    geom_smooth(method = "lm",   formula = y ~ x, se = FALSE, color = "#4d9221") +
    annotate("text",
             x = 20,
             y = 2.2,
             label = p_label,
             hjust = 0,
             size = 4) +
    scale_x_continuous(
        breaks = c(0,30,60),
        labels = c("0","30","60")
    ) +  
  # scale_color_manual(
  #                 values = c(
  #                     "KIDNEY" = "#4d9221",
  #                     "METASTASIS" = "#c51b7d"        ))+
    labs(
        x = "Recurrence Time (months)",
        y = "Angiogenesis"
    ) +
    coord_cartesian(ylim = c(-3,3), xlim = c(0,75)) +
    theme_minimal()

##cellcycle figure
fit <- lm(cellcycle ~ time, data = clinmores)
summary(fit)

anova(fit, test= "LRT")

p_label <- "p = 0.063"

summary(fit)

##cellcycle
cellcyclestraccont <- ggplot(clinmores, aes(x = time, y = cellcycle)) +
    geom_point(alpha = 0.7,colour="#4d9221") +
    geom_smooth(method = "lm",   formula = y ~ x, se = FALSE, color = "#4d9221") +
    annotate("text",
             x = 20,
             y = 2.2,
             label = p_label,
             hjust = 0,
             size = 4) +
    scale_x_continuous(
        breaks = c(0,30,60),
        labels = c("0","30","60")
    ) +  
  # scale_color_manual(
  #                 values = c(
  #                     "KIDNEY" = "#4d9221",
  #                     "METASTASIS" = "#c51b7d"        ))+
    labs(
        x = "Recurrence Time (months)",
        y = "Cell Cycle"
    ) +
    coord_cartesian(ylim = c(-3,3), xlim = c(0,75)) +
    theme_minimal()


##cellcycle figure
fit <- lm(stroma ~ time, data = clinmores)
summary(fit)

anova(fit, test= "LRT")

p_label <- "p = 0.023"

summary(fit)

##stroma
stromastraccont <- ggplot(clinmores, aes(x = time, y = stroma)) +
    geom_point(alpha = 0.7,colour="#4d9221") +
    geom_smooth(method = "lm",   formula = y ~ x, se = FALSE, color = "#4d9221") +
    annotate("text",
             x = 20,
             y = 2.2,
             label = p_label,
             hjust = 0,
             size = 4) +
    scale_x_continuous(
        breaks = c(0,30,60),
        labels = c("0","30","60")
    ) +  
  # scale_color_manual(
  #                 values = c(
  #                     "KIDNEY" = "#4d9221",
  #                     "METASTASIS" = "#c51b7d"        ))+
    labs(
        x = "Recurrence Time (months)",
        y = "Stroma"
    ) +
    coord_cartesian(ylim = c(-3,3), xlim = c(0,75)) +
    theme_minimal()


##myeloid figure
fit <- lm(myeloid ~ time, data = clinmores)
summary(fit)
cbind(
  coef(fit),
  confint(fit)
)

anova(fit, test= "LRT")


# p_label <- "p = 0.55"

summary(fit)

myeloidstraccont <- ggplot(clinmores, aes(x = time, y = myeloid)) +
    geom_point(alpha = 0.7,colour="#4d9221") +
    geom_smooth(method = "lm",   formula = y ~ x, se = FALSE, color = "#4d9221") +
    # annotate("text",
    #          x = 20,
    #          y = 2.2,
    #          label = p_label,
    #          hjust = 0,
    #          size = 4) +
    scale_x_continuous(
        breaks = c(0,30,60),
        labels = c("0","30","60")
    ) +  
  # scale_color_manual(
  #                 values = c(
  #                     "KIDNEY" = "#4d9221",
  #                     "METASTASIS" = "#c51b7d"        ))+
    labs(
        x = "Recurrence Time (months)",
        y = "Myeloid"
    ) +
    coord_cartesian(ylim = c(-3,3), xlim = c(0,75)) +
    theme_minimal()

##teff figure
fit <- lm(teff ~ time, data = clinmores)
summary(fit)
cbind(
  coef(fit),
  confint(fit)
)

anova(fit, test= "LRT")


# p_label <- "p = 0.55"

summary(fit)

teffstraccont <- ggplot(clinmores, aes(x = time, y = teff)) +
    geom_point(alpha = 0.7,colour="#4d9221") +
    geom_smooth(method = "lm",   formula = y ~ x, se = FALSE, color = "#4d9221") +
    # annotate("text",
    #          x = 20,
    #          y = 2.2,
    #          label = p_label,
    #          hjust = 0,
    #          size = 4) +
    scale_x_continuous(
        breaks = c(0,30,60),
        labels = c("0","30","60")
    ) +  
  # scale_color_manual(
  #                 values = c(
  #                     "KIDNEY" = "#4d9221",
  #                     "METASTASIS" = "#c51b7d"        ))+
    labs(
        x = "Recurrence Time (months)",
        y = "Myeloid"
    ) +
    coord_cartesian(ylim = c(-3,3), xlim = c(0,75)) +
    theme_minimal()



#hallmarkpathway

finalexp<-subset(clinmores,clinmores$id %in% rownames(TPM))
finalexp$timetotrial <- as.numeric(finalexp$EEVALUEM)

design <- model.matrix(~ timetotrial
                       
                       , data = finalexp)

ftpm<-TPM[match(finalexp$id,rownames(TPM)),]


fit_time <- lmFit(t(ftpm), design)
fit_time <- eBayes(fit_time)


rank_time <- fit_time$t[, "timetotrial"]
names(rank_time) <- rownames(fit_time)

rank_time <- sort(rank_time, decreasing = TRUE)


fg_time <- fgsea(
  pathways = hallmark_list,
  stats = rank_time, nperm = 100000
)

fg_time_df <- as.data.frame(fg_time)

sig_time   <- fg_time_df$pathway[fg_time_df$padj < 0.1]

fg_time_plot <- fg_time_df[match(pathways_keep, fg_time_df$pathway), ]

fg_time_plot$order<-match(fg_time_plot$pathway,nes_mat$pathway)

fg_time_plot$pathway_clean <- gsub("HALLMARK_", "", fg_time_plot$pathway)


fg_time_plot$nesflip<-(-fg_time_plot$NES)

hallmarkbarstrac <- ggplot(fg_time_plot,
                      aes(x = nesflip, y = reorder(pathway_clean, order), fill = nesflip)) +
  geom_col() +
  
  geom_text(
    data = subset(fg_time_plot, padj < 0.05),
    aes(label = "*",
        hjust = ifelse(nesflip > 0, -0.3, 1.3)),
    size = 6,
    fontface = "bold"
  ) +
  scale_x_reverse() +
  scale_y_discrete(expand = expansion(mult = c(0.1, 0.0))) +
  scale_fill_gradient2(
    low = "#2166ac", mid = "gray95", high = "#b2182b",
    midpoint = 0, limits = c(-2.1, 4.3), name = "NES"
  ) +
  theme_minimal() +
  annotate("text", x = 0, y = 0,
           label = "ŌåÉ Enriched Earlier     Enriched Later ŌåÆ",
           vjust = 1, size = 3) +
  theme(plot.title.position = "plot",
        plot.title = element_text(hjust = 0),
        legend.position = "none") +
  labs(x = "", y = "",
       title = "Hallmark Pathway Enrichment Across Recurrence Time-\nS-TRAC Recurrences (n=42)")


hallmarkbarstrac






```

```{r IMmotion 010 validation}

imm010clin <- read_excel("~/Library/CloudStorage/OneDrive-MichiganMedicine/Research/IMotion010/WO39210_ANON_IMmotion010.baseline.patient.data.778.20250513.xlsx")

#remove M1NED patients
imm010clinnephrec<-imm010clin[imm010clin$SCORE!="M1 NED",]

imm010fmi <- read_excel("~/Library/CloudStorage/OneDrive-MichiganMedicine/Research/IMotion010/WO39210_ANON_IMmotion010.baseline.recurrence.FMI.data.160.20250304.xlsx")


imm010clinrecur <- read_excel("~/Library/CloudStorage/OneDrive-MichiganMedicine/Research/IMotion010/WO39210_ANON_IMmotion010.baseline.recurrence.patient.data.160.20250513.xlsx")
#eliminates redundant
imm010clinrecur<-imm010clinrecur[imm010clinrecur$VISIT=="progression",]

imm010clinrecur$score<-imm010clin$SCORE[match(imm010clinrecur$HASHED_PATID,imm010clin$HASHED_PATID)]

imm010rnarecur <- read_excel("~/Library/CloudStorage/OneDrive-MichiganMedicine/Research/IMotion010/WO39210_ANON_IMmotion010.baseline.recurrence.rnaseq.160.20250304.xlsx")

imm010clinrecur<-imm010clinrecur[imm010clinrecur$VISIT=="progression",]

imm010clinrecur$score<-imm010clin$SCORE[match(imm010clinrecur$HASHED_PATID,imm010clin$HASHED_PATID)]


imm010rna <- read_excel("~/Library/CloudStorage/OneDrive-MichiganMedicine/Research/IMotion010/WO39210_ANON_IMmotion010.baseline.rnaseq.754.20250304.xlsx")

imm010rnarecur<-imm010rnarecur[,!colnames(imm010rnarecur) %in% colnames(imm010rna)]

#again could consider removing this
# CAN ONLY DO ONCE
 imm010rna<-cbind(imm010rna,imm010rnarecur)

#eliminating some unnamed genes (2500, could include for more granulatity)
imm010rna<-imm010rna[,colnames(imm010rna)!="Unnamed: 0"]
imm010rna<-imm010rna[!is.na(imm010rna$GENE_SYMBOL),]


genes<-imm010rna$GENE_SYMBOL


imm010trna<-as.data.frame(t(imm010rna))

colnames(imm010trna)<-imm010rna$GENE_SYMBOL
imm010trna<-imm010trna[rownames(imm010trna)!="GENE_SYMBOL",]
imm010trna[] <- lapply(imm010trna, as.numeric)

#removes non-nephrectomy patients
# eliminate M1 NED patients you are focusing on nephrectomy recurrence
#can scale before or after does not really matter, but for the sake of approach consistency did it after


# imm010trna<-imm010trna[rownames(imm010trna) %in% imm010clinnephrec$HASHED_RNA_SAMPLE_ID,]


imm010rnaz <- as.data.frame(scale(imm010trna))




imm010rnaz$angio <- rowMedians(
  as.matrix(imm010rnaz[, colnames(imm010rnaz) %in% angio])
)


imm010rnaz$teff <- rowMedians(
  as.matrix(imm010rnaz[, colnames(imm010rnaz) %in% teff])
)

imm010rnaz$myeloid <- rowMedians(
  as.matrix(imm010rnaz[, colnames(imm010rnaz) %in% myeloid])
)


imm010rnaz$g15 <- rowSums(
  as.matrix(imm010rnaz[, colnames(imm010rnaz) %in% g15])
)

imm010rnaz$stroma <- rowMedians(
  as.matrix(imm010rnaz[, colnames(imm010rnaz) %in% stroma])
)

imm010rnaz$cellcycle <- rowMedians(
  as.matrix(imm010rnaz[, colnames(imm010rnaz) %in% cellcycle])
)


imm010rnaz$emt <- rowSums(
  as.matrix(imm010rnaz[, colnames(imm010rnaz) %in% emt])
)

imm010rnaz$emtmed <- rowMedians(
  as.matrix(imm010rnaz[, colnames(imm010rnaz) %in% emt])
)

imm010rnaz$g15 <- rowSums(
  as.matrix(imm010rnaz[, colnames(imm010rnaz) %in% g15])
)

# imm010rnaz$hallmarkemt <- rowSums(
#   as.matrix(imm010rnaz[, colnames(imm010rnaz) %in% hallmarkemt])
# )

# 
# # Full table from the limma fit
# res <- topTable(fit_time, coef = "timetotrial",
#                 number = Inf, sort.by = "none")
# res$gene <- rownames(res)
# 
# 
# design <- model.matrix(~ timetotrial+site
# 
#                        , data = finalexp)
# 
# ftpm<-tpmjav_num[match(finalexp$natid,rownames(tpmjav_z)),]
# fit_time <- lmFit(t(ftpm), design)
# fit_time <- eBayes(fit_time)
# rank_time <- fit_time$t[, "timetotrial"]
# names(rank_time) <- rownames(fit_time)
# 
# # Full table from the limma fit
# res <- topTable(fit_time, coef = "timetotrial",
#                 number = Inf, sort.by = "none")
# res$gene <- rownames(res)
# 
# 
# # Top 25 genes upregulated in EARLY recurrence (most negative t)
# early_genes <- res[order(res$t), ][1:100, ]
# 
# # Top 25 genes upregulated in LATE recurrence (most positive t)
# late_genes <- res[order(-res$t), ][1:100, ]
# 
# early_genes[, c("gene","logFC","t","P.Value","adj.P.Val")]
# late_genes[,  c("gene","logFC","t","P.Value","adj.P.Val")]
# 
# 
# # imm010rnaz$tengenes <- rowSums(
# #   as.matrix(imm010rnaz[, colnames(imm010rnaz) %in% tengenes])
# # )
# late_mat <- as.matrix(imm010rnaz[, colnames(imm010rnaz) %in% rownames(late_genes)])
# late_score <- rowMeans(late_mat, na.rm = TRUE)
# 
# imm010rnaz$tengenes <-
#   rowMeans(
#   as.matrix(imm010rnaz[, colnames(imm010rnaz) %in% rownames(early_genes)])
# )-
# late_score
# # 
# # imm010clin$tengenes<-imm010rnaz$tengenes[match(imm010clin$HASHED_RNA_SAMPLE_ID,rownames(imm010rnaz))]
# # 
# imm010clins<-imm010clin[imm010clin$SCORE!="M1 NED",]
# imm010clins$high<-imm010clins$emt>median(as.numeric(imm010clins$emt), na.rm = TRUE)
# imm010clins$highs<-imm010clins$emtmed>median(as.numeric(imm010clins$emtmed), na.rm = TRUE)
# 
# 
# 
# 
# # # imm010clins<-imm010clin
# 
# 
 # imm010clins<-subset(imm010clin,imm010clin$KIM1_C1D1>200)

# ggsurvplot(survfit(Surv(DFS_MONTHS,DFS_CENSOR)~
#                        TREATMENT_ARM
#                    ,
#                    data=imm010clins)
#            ,risk.table = TRUE,cumevents  =TRUE)


imm010clin$angio<-imm010rnaz$angio[match(imm010clin$HASHED_RNA_SAMPLE_ID,rownames(imm010rnaz))]
imm010clin$cellcycle<-imm010rnaz$cellcycle[match(imm010clin$HASHED_RNA_SAMPLE_ID,rownames(imm010rnaz))]
imm010clin$teff<-imm010rnaz$teff[match(imm010clin$HASHED_RNA_SAMPLE_ID,rownames(imm010rnaz))]
imm010clin$myeloid<-imm010rnaz$myeloid[match(imm010clin$HASHED_RNA_SAMPLE_ID,rownames(imm010rnaz))]
imm010clin$stroma<-imm010rnaz$stroma[match(imm010clin$HASHED_RNA_SAMPLE_ID,rownames(imm010rnaz))]
imm010clin$emt<-imm010rnaz$emt[match(imm010clin$HASHED_RNA_SAMPLE_ID,rownames(imm010rnaz))]
imm010clin$tengenes<-imm010rnaz$tengenes[match(imm010clin$HASHED_RNA_SAMPLE_ID,rownames(imm010rnaz))]
imm010clin$g15<-imm010rnaz$g15[match(imm010clin$HASHED_RNA_SAMPLE_ID,rownames(imm010rnaz))]
# imm010clin$hallmarkemt<-imm010rnaz$hallmarkemt[match(imm010clin$HASHED_RNA_SAMPLE_ID,rownames(imm010rnaz))]
imm010clin$emtmed<-imm010rnaz$emtmed[match(imm010clin$HASHED_RNA_SAMPLE_ID,rownames(imm010rnaz))]

imm010clinrecur$angio<-imm010rnaz$angio[match(imm010clinrecur$HASHED_RNA_SAMPLE_ID,rownames(imm010rnaz))]
imm010clinrecur$cellcycle<-imm010rnaz$cellcycle[match(imm010clinrecur$HASHED_RNA_SAMPLE_ID,rownames(imm010rnaz))]
imm010clinrecur$teff<-imm010rnaz$teff[match(imm010clinrecur$HASHED_RNA_SAMPLE_ID,rownames(imm010rnaz))]
imm010clinrecur$myeloid<-imm010rnaz$myeloid[match(imm010clinrecur$HASHED_RNA_SAMPLE_ID,rownames(imm010rnaz))]
imm010clinrecur$stroma<-imm010rnaz$stroma[match(imm010clinrecur$HASHED_RNA_SAMPLE_ID,rownames(imm010rnaz))]
imm010clinrecur$emt<-imm010rnaz$emt[match(imm010clinrecur$HASHED_RNA_SAMPLE_ID,rownames(imm010rnaz))]
# imm010clinrecur$tengenes<-imm010rnaz$tengenes[match(imm010clinrecur$HASHED_RNA_SAMPLE_ID,rownames(imm010rnaz))]
imm010clinrecur$g15<-imm010rnaz$g15[match(imm010clinrecur$HASHED_RNA_SAMPLE_ID,rownames(imm010rnaz))]
# imm010clin$hallmarkemt<-imm010rnaz$hallmarkemt[match(imm010clin$HASHED_RNA_SAMPLE_ID,rownames(imm010rnaz))]
imm010clinrecur$emtmed<-imm010rnaz$emtmed[match(imm010clinrecur$HASHED_RNA_SAMPLE_ID,rownames(imm010rnaz))]

imm010clinrecur$time<-imm010clinrecur$DFS_MONTHS

imm010clin$angiorecur<-imm010clinrecur$angio[match(imm010clin$HASHED_PATID,imm010clinrecur$HASHED_PATID)]

imm010clin$nmfrecur<-imm010clinrecur$NMF_SUBTYPE[match(imm010clin$HASHED_PATID,imm010clinrecur$HASHED_PATID)]

imm010clin$time<-imm010clin$DFS_MONTHS





# ggplot(imm010clinrecurnephec, aes(x = time, y = emt,colour= TREATMENT_ARM)) +
#     geom_point(alpha = 0.7) 

# imm010clinrecurnephrecprim<-imm010clin[match(imm010clinrecurnephec$HASHED_PATID,imm010clin$HASHED_PATID),]

#non M1NED patients that recur on placebo

imm010clin$categories_plot<-ifelse(imm010clin$time<12,"early","intermediate")

imm010placeborec<-imm010clin[imm010clin$SCORE!="M1 NED" &imm010clin$TREATMENT_ARM=="PLACEBO" & imm010clin$DFS_CENSOR == TRUE,]

imm010atezorec<-imm010clin[imm010clin$SCORE!="M1 NED" &imm010clin$TREATMENT_ARM!="PLACEBO" & imm010clin$DFS_CENSOR == TRUE,]

imm010rec<-imm010clin[imm010clin$SCORE!="M1 NED" & imm010clin$DFS_CENSOR == TRUE,]

#this is recurrence sequencing
# imm010clinrecurnephrec<-imm010clinrecur[imm010clinrecur$score!="M1 NED",]
# 
# imm010clinrecurnephrec$angioprim<-imm010clin$angio[match(imm010clinrecurnephrec$HASHED_PATID,imm010clin$HASHED_PATID)]
# imm010clinrecurnephrec$NMF_SUBTYPE<-imm010clin$NMF_SUBTYPE[match(imm010clinrecurnephrec$HASHED_PATID,imm010clin$HASHED_PATID)]


##angio figure
fit <- lm(angio ~ time, data = imm010placeborec)
summary(fit)
cbind(
  coef(fit),
  confint(fit)
)

anova(fit, test= "LRT")


p_label <- "p = 0.0014"

summary(fit)

angioimm010cont <- ggplot(imm010placeborec, aes(x = time, y = angio)) +
    geom_point(alpha = 0.7,colour="#4d9221") +
    geom_smooth(method = "lm",   formula = y ~ x, se = FALSE, color = "#4d9221") +
    annotate("text",
             x = 20,
             y = 2.2,
             label = p_label,
             hjust = 0,
             size = 4) +
    scale_x_continuous(
        breaks = c(0,30,60),
        labels = c("0","30","60")
    ) +  
  # scale_color_manual(
  #                 values = c(
  #                     "KIDNEY" = "#4d9221",
  #                     "METASTASIS" = "#c51b7d"        ))+
    labs(
        x = "Recurrence Time (months)",
        y = "Angiogenesis"
    ) +
    coord_cartesian(ylim = c(-3,3), xlim = c(0,60)) +
    theme_minimal()

##cellcycle figure
fit <- lm(cellcycle ~ time, data = imm010placeborec)
summary(fit)

cbind(
  coef(fit),
  confint(fit)
)

anova(fit, test= "LRT")

p_label <- "p = 0.0045"

summary(fit)

##cellcycle
cellcycleimm010cont <- ggplot(imm010placeborec, aes(x = time, y = cellcycle)) +
    geom_point(alpha = 0.7,colour="#4d9221") +
    geom_smooth(method = "lm",   formula = y ~ x, se = FALSE, color = "#4d9221") +
    annotate("text",
             x = 20,
             y = 2.2,
             label = p_label,
             hjust = 0,
             size = 4) +
    scale_x_continuous(
        breaks = c(0,30,60),
        labels = c("0","30","60")
    ) +  
  # scale_color_manual(
  #                 values = c(
  #                     "KIDNEY" = "#4d9221",
  #                     "METASTASIS" = "#c51b7d"        ))+
    labs(
        x = "Recurrence Time (months)",
        y = "Cell Cycle"
    ) +
    coord_cartesian(ylim = c(-3,3), xlim = c(0,60)) +
    theme_minimal()


##stroma figure
fit <- lm(stroma ~ time, data = imm010placeborec)


summary(fit)

cbind(
  coef(fit),
  confint(fit)
)


anova(fit, test= "LRT")

p_label <- "p = 0.0049"

summary(fit)

##stroma
stromasimm010cont <- ggplot(imm010placeborec, aes(x = time, y = stroma)) +
    geom_point(alpha = 0.7,colour="#4d9221") +
    geom_smooth(method = "lm",   formula = y ~ x, se = FALSE, color = "#4d9221") +
    annotate("text",
             x = 20,
             y = 2.2,
             label = p_label,
             hjust = 0,
             size = 4) +
    scale_x_continuous(
        breaks = c(0,30,60),
        labels = c("0","30","60")
    ) +  
  # scale_color_manual(
  #                 values = c(
  #                     "KIDNEY" = "#4d9221",
  #                     "METASTASIS" = "#c51b7d"        ))+
    labs(
        x = "Recurrence Time (months)",
        y = "Stroma"
    ) +
    coord_cartesian(ylim = c(-3,3), xlim = c(0,60)) +
    theme_minimal()


##myeloid figure
fit <- lm(myeloid ~ time, data = imm010placeborec)
summary(fit)
cbind(
  coef(fit),
  confint(fit)
)

anova(fit, test= "LRT")


 p_label <- "p = 0.037"

summary(fit)

myeloidimm010cont <- ggplot(imm010placeborec, aes(x = time, y = myeloid)) +
    geom_point(alpha = 0.7,colour="#4d9221") +
    geom_smooth(method = "lm",   formula = y ~ x, se = FALSE, color = "#4d9221") +
      annotate("text",
             x = 20,
             y = 2.2,
             label = p_label,
             hjust = 0,
             size = 4) +
    # annotate("text",
    #          x = 20,
    #          y = 2.2,
    #          label = p_label,
    #          hjust = 0,
    #          size = 4) +
    scale_x_continuous(
        breaks = c(0,30,60),
        labels = c("0","30","60")
    ) +  
  # scale_color_manual(
  #                 values = c(
  #                     "KIDNEY" = "#4d9221",
  #                     "METASTASIS" = "#c51b7d"        ))+
    labs(
        x = "Recurrence Time (months)",
        y = "Myeloid"
    ) +
    coord_cartesian(ylim = c(-3,3), xlim = c(0,60)) +
    theme_minimal()

##teff figure
fit <- lm(teff ~ time, data = imm010placeborec)
summary(fit)
cbind(
  coef(fit),
  confint(fit)
)

anova(fit, test= "LRT")


# p_label <- "p = 0.55"

summary(fit)

teffimm010cont <- ggplot(imm010placeborec, aes(x = time, y = teff)) +
    geom_point(alpha = 0.7,colour="#4d9221") +
    geom_smooth(method = "lm",   formula = y ~ x, se = FALSE, color = "#4d9221") +
    # annotate("text",
    #          x = 20,
    #          y = 2.2,
    #          label = p_label,
    #          hjust = 0,
    #          size = 4) +
    scale_x_continuous(
        breaks = c(0,30,60),
        labels = c("0","30","60")
    ) +  
  # scale_color_manual(
  #                 values = c(
  #                     "KIDNEY" = "#4d9221",
  #                     "METASTASIS" = "#c51b7d"        ))+
    labs(
        x = "Recurrence Time (months)",
        y = "T-Effector"
    ) +
    coord_cartesian(ylim = c(-3,3), xlim = c(0,60)) +
    theme_minimal()



#hallmarkpathway

finalexp<-subset(imm010placeborec,imm010placeborec$HASHED_RNA_SAMPLE_ID %in% rownames(imm010trna))

# finalexp<-subset(imm010rec,imm010rec$HASHED_RNA_SAMPLE_ID %in% rownames(imm010trna))


# finalexp<-subset(imm010atezorec,imm010atezorec$HASHED_RNA_SAMPLE_ID %in% rownames(imm010trna))

# finalexp<-subset(imm010rec,imm010rec$HASHED_RNA_SAMPLE_ID %in% rownames(imm010trna))


finalexp$timetotrial <- as.numeric(finalexp$DFS_MONTHS)

# design <- model.matrix(~ TREATMENT_ARM
# 
#                        , data = finalexp)

design <- model.matrix(~ timetotrial
                       
                       , data = finalexp)

ftpm<-imm010trna[match(finalexp$HASHED_RNA_SAMPLE_ID,rownames(imm010trna)),]


fit_time <- lmFit(t(ftpm), design)
fit_time <- eBayes(fit_time)


rank_time <- fit_time$t[, "timetotrial"]


# rank_time <- fit_time$t[, "TREATMENT_ARMPLACEBO"]

names(rank_time) <- rownames(fit_time)

rank_time <- sort(rank_time, decreasing = TRUE)


rank_time <- rank_time[!is.na(rank_time)]
rank_time <- rank_time[order(-abs(rank_time))]
rank_time <- rank_time[!duplicated(names(rank_time))]
rank_time <- sort(rank_time, decreasing = TRUE)

fg_time <- fgsea(
  pathways = hallmark_list,
  stats = rank_time, nperm = 100000
)



fg_time_df <- as.data.frame(fg_time)

sig_time   <- fg_time_df$pathway[fg_time_df$padj < 0.1]

fg_time_plot <- fg_time_df[match(pathways_keep, fg_time_df$pathway), ]

fg_time_plot$order<-match(fg_time_plot$pathway,nes_mat$pathway)

fg_time_plot$pathway_clean <- gsub("HALLMARK_", "", fg_time_plot$pathway)


fg_time_plot$nesflip<-(-fg_time_plot$NES)

hallmarkbarimm010 <- ggplot(fg_time_plot,
                      aes(x = nesflip, y = reorder(pathway_clean, order), fill = nesflip)) +
  geom_col() +  
  
  scale_x_reverse() +
  scale_y_discrete(expand = expansion(mult = c(0.1, 0.0))) +
  scale_fill_gradient2(
    low = "#2166ac",
    mid = "gray95",
    high = "#b2182b",
    midpoint = 0,
      limits = c(-2.1, 4.3),
    name = "NES"
  )  +
  theme_minimal()  +
    annotate(
        "text",
        x = 0,
        y = 0,   # adjust depending on spacing
        label = "ŌåÉ Enriched Earlier     Enriched Later ŌåÆ",
        vjust = 1,  size = 3
    ) +
  theme(
    plot.title.position = "plot",
    plot.title = element_text(hjust = 0)
  )+
  labs(
    x = "",
    y = "",
    title = "Hallmark Pathway Enrichment Across Recurrence Time-\nIMmotion 010 Recurrences (placebo only; n=88)"
  )+theme(legend.position = "none")


hallmarkbarimm010
hallmarkbarimm010 <- ggplot(fg_time_plot,
                      aes(x = nesflip, y = reorder(pathway_clean, order), fill = nesflip)) +
  geom_col() +
  geom_text(
    data = subset(fg_time_plot, padj < 0.05),
    aes(label = "*",
        hjust = ifelse(nesflip > 0, -0.3, 1.3)),
    size = 6,
    fontface = "bold"
  ) +
  scale_x_reverse() +
  scale_y_discrete(expand = expansion(mult = c(0.1, 0.0))) +
  scale_fill_gradient2(
    low = "#2166ac", mid = "gray95", high = "#b2182b",
    midpoint = 0, limits = c(-2.1, 4.3), name = "NES"
  ) +
  theme_minimal() +
  annotate("text", x = 0, y = 0,
           label = "ŌåÉ Enriched Earlier     Enriched Later ŌåÆ",
           vjust = 1, size = 3) +
  theme(plot.title.position = "plot",
        plot.title = element_text(hjust = 0),
        legend.position = "none") +
  labs(x = "", y = "",
       title = "Hallmark Pathway Enrichment Across Recurrence Time-\nIMmotion 010 Recurrences (placebo only; n=88)")



combined_all<-plot_grid(
    hallmarkheat,
    hallmarkbar,angiocat,angiocont,cellcyclecat,cellcyclecont,
    ncol = 2,
    rel_widths = c(1.3, 1),rel_heights = c(2,1,1)
)

combined_allstrac<-plot_grid(
    hallmarkbarstrac,angiostraccont,cellcyclestraccont,
    ncol =1,rel_heights = c(2,1,1)
)

combinedjavstract<-plot_grid(
    hallmarkheat,
    hallmarkbar,hallmarkbarstrac,
    angiocat,angiocont,angiostraccont,cellcyclecat,cellcyclecont,cellcyclestraccont,
    ncol = 3,
    rel_widths = c(1, 1,1),rel_heights = c(1,0.6,0.6)
)

# combinedjavstracimm010<-plot_grid(
#     hallmarkheat,
#     hallmarkbar,hallmarkbarstrac,hallmarkbarimm010,
#     angiocat,angiocont,angiostraccont,angioimm010cont,
#     cellcyclecat,cellcyclecont,cellcyclestraccont,cellcycleimm010cont,
#     stromacat,stromacont,stromastraccont,stromasimm010cont,
#     ncol = 4,
#     rel_widths = c(1, 1,0.8,0.75),rel_heights = c(1,0.6,0.6)
# )

combinedjavstracimm010<-plot_grid(
    hallmarkheat,
    hallmarkbar,hallmarkbarstrac,hallmarkbarimm010,
    angiocat,angiocont,angiostraccont,angioimm010cont,
    cellcyclecat,cellcyclecont,cellcyclestraccont,cellcycleimm010cont,
    ncol = 4,
    rel_widths = c(1, 1,1,1),rel_heights = c(1,0.5,0.5)
)
combinedjavstracimm010

combinedjavstracimm010_buffered <- combinedjavstracimm010 +
  theme(plot.margin = ggplot2::margin(t = 10, r = 0, b = 0, l = 10, unit = "mm"))


combinedjavstract
combined_all

combinedstroma<-plot_grid(
stromacat,stromacont,stromastraccont,stromasimm010cont,
    ncol = 4,
    rel_widths = c(1, 1,1,1)
)

combinedteff<-plot_grid(
teffcat,teffcont,teffstraccont,teffimm010cont,
    ncol = 4,
    rel_widths = c(1, 1,1,1)
)


combinedmyeloid<-plot_grid(
myeloidcat,myeloidcont,myeloidstraccont,myeloidimm010cont,
    ncol = 4,
    rel_widths = c(1, 1,1,1)
)


```
#stratified analyses- metastasis sequencing only, primary tumor sequencing only
#and on co-author suggestion exclusion of sarcomatoid, and stratified to no sarcomatoid, and high grade (1/2) and low grade (3/4)

```{r sensitivity analysis to ensure significance is retained for only primary and only met site sequencing, applied on continuous analyses (early vs late, DEG)}

#metastasis only
finalexp<-subset(final,final$natid %in% rownames(tpmjav_z))
finalexp <- subset(finalexp, categories != "De Novo Metastatic")
finalexp<-subset(finalexp, site == "METASTASIS")
finalexp$timetotrial <- as.numeric(finalexp$timetotrial)


fit <- lm(wgii ~ timetotrial, data = finalexp)
finalexp$predwgii<-predict(fit,newdata = finalexp)
cbind(
  coef(fit),
  confint(fit)
)

anova(fit, test= "LRT")

summary(fit)



p_label <- "p = 0.061"


wgiimetonly <- ggplot(finalexp, aes(x = timetotrialcut, y = wgii,colour=site)) +
    geom_point(alpha = 0.7) +
  geom_line(aes(x=timetotrial,y=predwgii),linewidth = 1.2)+
    annotate("text",
             x = 40,
             y = 0.5,
             label = p_label,
             hjust = 0,
             size = 4) +  
  scale_color_manual(
                 values = c(
                     "KIDNEY" = "#4d9221",
                     "METASTASIS" = "#c51b7d"        ))+
    scale_x_continuous(
        breaks = c(0,30,60,90,120),
        labels = c("0","30","60","90",">120")
    ) +
    labs(
        x = "Recurrence Time (months)",
        y = "WGII",
  colour = "Sequencing\nSite"
    ) +
    coord_cartesian(ylim = c(0,0.7), xlim = c(0,120)) +
    theme_minimal()


fit <- lm(cellcycle ~ timetotrial, data = finalexp)
finalexp$predcellcycle<-predict(fit,newdata = finalexp)
cbind(
  coef(fit),
  confint(fit)
)

anova(fit, test= "LRT")

summary(fit)



p_label <- "p = 5e-5"


cellcyclemetonly <- ggplot(finalexp, aes(x = timetotrialcut, y = cellcycle,colour=site)) +
    geom_point(alpha = 0.7) +
  geom_line(aes(x=timetotrial,y=predcellcycle),linewidth = 1.2)+
    annotate("text",
             x = 40,
             y = 2.2,
             label = p_label,
             hjust = 0,
             size = 4) +  
  scale_color_manual(
                 values = c(
                     "KIDNEY" = "#4d9221",
                     "METASTASIS" = "#c51b7d"        ))+
    scale_x_continuous(
        breaks = c(0,30,60,90,120),
        labels = c("0","30","60","90",">120")
    ) +
    labs(
        x = "Recurrence Time (months)",
        y = "Cell Cycle",
  colour = "Sequencing\nSite"
    ) +
    coord_cartesian(ylim = c(-3,3), xlim = c(0,120)) +
    theme_minimal()



fit <- lm(angio ~ timetotrial, data = finalexp)
finalexp$predangio<-predict(fit,newdata = finalexp)
cbind(
  coef(fit),
  confint(fit)
)

anova(fit, test= "LRT")

summary(fit)



p_label <- "p = 0.16"


angiometonly <- ggplot(finalexp, aes(x = timetotrialcut, y = angio,colour=site)) +
    geom_point(alpha = 0.7) +
  geom_line(aes(x=timetotrial,y=predangio),linewidth = 1.2)+
    annotate("text",
             x = 40,
             y = 2.2,
             label = p_label,
             hjust = 0,
             size = 4) +  
  scale_color_manual(
                 values = c(
                     "KIDNEY" = "#4d9221",
                     "METASTASIS" = "#c51b7d"        ))+
    scale_x_continuous(
        breaks = c(0,30,60,90,120),
        labels = c("0","30","60","90",">120")
    ) +
    labs(
        x = "Recurrence Time (months)",
        y = "Angio",
  colour = "Sequencing\nSite"
    ) +
    coord_cartesian(ylim = c(-3,3), xlim = c(0,120)) +
    theme_minimal()


fit <- lm(stroma ~ timetotrial, data = finalexp)
finalexp$predstroma<-predict(fit,newdata = finalexp)
cbind(
  coef(fit),
  confint(fit)
)

anova(fit, test= "LRT")

summary(fit)



p_label <- "p = 0.00013"


stromametonly <- ggplot(finalexp, aes(x = timetotrialcut, y = stroma,colour=site)) +
    geom_point(alpha = 0.7) +
  geom_line(aes(x=timetotrial,y=predstroma),linewidth = 1.2)+
    annotate("text",
             x = 40,
             y = 2.2,
             label = p_label,
             hjust = 0,
             size = 4) +  
  scale_color_manual(
                 values = c(
                     "KIDNEY" = "#4d9221",
                     "METASTASIS" = "#c51b7d"        ))+
    scale_x_continuous(
        breaks = c(0,30,60,90,120),
        labels = c("0","30","60","90",">120")
    ) +
    labs(
        x = "Recurrence Time (months)",
        y = "Stroma",
  colour = "Sequencing\nSite"
    ) +
    coord_cartesian(ylim = c(-3,3), xlim = c(0,120)) +
    theme_minimal()


#hallmark

design <- model.matrix(~ timetotrial
                       
                       , data = finalexp)

ftpm<-tpmjav_num[match(finalexp$natid,rownames(tpmjav_z)),]


fit_time <- lmFit(t(ftpm), design)
fit_time <- eBayes(fit_time)


rank_time <- fit_time$t[, "timetotrial"]
names(rank_time) <- rownames(fit_time)

rank_time <- sort(rank_time, decreasing = TRUE)


fg_time <- fgsea(
  pathways = hallmark_list,
  stats = rank_time, nperm = 100000
)

fg_time_df <- as.data.frame(fg_time)

 sig_time   <- fg_time_df$pathway[fg_time_df$padj < 0.05]

fg_time_plot <- fg_time_df[match(pathways_keep, fg_time_df$pathway), ]

fg_time_plot$order<-match(fg_time_plot$pathway,nes_mat$pathway)

fg_time_plot$pathway_clean <- gsub("HALLMARK_", "", fg_time_plot$pathway)


fg_time_plot$nesflip<-(-fg_time_plot$NES)

hallmarkbarmetonly <- ggplot(fg_time_plot,
                      aes(x = nesflip, y = reorder(pathway_clean, order), fill = nesflip)) +
  geom_col() +
      geom_text(
    data = subset(fg_time_plot, padj < 0.05),
    aes(label = "*",
        hjust = ifelse(nesflip > 0, -0.3, 1.3)),
    size = 6,
    fontface = "bold"
  ) +
  scale_x_reverse() +
  scale_y_discrete(expand = expansion(mult = c(0.1, 0.0))) +
  scale_fill_gradient2(
    low = "#2166ac",
    mid = "gray95",
    high = "#b2182b",
    midpoint = 0,
        limits = c(-2.3, 4.3),
    name = "NES"
  ) +
  theme_minimal()  +
    annotate(
        "text",
        x = 0,
        y = 0,   # adjust depending on spacing
        label = "ŌåÉ Enriched Earlier     Enriched Later ŌåÆ",
        vjust = 1,  size = 3
    )+
  theme(
    plot.title.position = "plot",
    plot.title = element_text(hjust = 0)
  )+
  geom_vline(xintercept = 0, linetype = "dashed", color = "gray50")+
  labs(
    x = "",
    y = "",
    title = "Hallmark Pathway Enrichment Across Recurrence Time-\nJAVELIN Renal 101- Metastatic Site Sequencing Only"
  )+theme(legend.position = "none")


#primary only
#primary only
#primary only
#primary only
#primary only
#primary only
#primary only
finalexp<-subset(final,final$natid %in% rownames(tpmjav_z))
finalexp <- subset(finalexp, categories != "De Novo Metastatic")
finalexp<-subset(finalexp, site != "METASTASIS")
finalexp$timetotrial <- as.numeric(finalexp$timetotrial)


fit <- lm(wgii ~ timetotrial, data = finalexp)
finalexp$predwgii<-predict(fit,newdata = finalexp)
cbind(
  coef(fit),
  confint(fit)
)

anova(fit, test= "LRT")

summary(fit)



p_label <- "p = 0.043"


wgiiprimonly <- ggplot(finalexp, aes(x = timetotrialcut, y = wgii,colour=site)) +
    geom_point(alpha = 0.7) +
  geom_line(aes(x=timetotrial,y=predwgii),linewidth = 1.2)+
    annotate("text",
             x = 40,
             y = 0.5,
             label = p_label,
             hjust = 0,
             size = 4) +  
  scale_color_manual(
                 values = c(
                     "KIDNEY" = "#4d9221",
                     "METASTASIS" = "#c51b7d"        ))+
    scale_x_continuous(
        breaks = c(0,30,60,90,120),
        labels = c("0","30","60","90",">120")
    ) +
    labs(
        x = "Recurrence Time (months)",
        y = "WGII",
  colour = "Sequencing\nSite"
    ) +
    coord_cartesian(ylim = c(0,0.7), xlim = c(0,120)) +
    theme_minimal()

wgiiprimonly



fit <- lm(cellcycle ~ timetotrial, data = finalexp)
finalexp$predcellcycle<-predict(fit,newdata = finalexp)
cbind(
  coef(fit),
  confint(fit)
)

anova(fit, test= "LRT")

summary(fit)



p_label <- "p = 0.045"


cellcycleprimonly <- ggplot(finalexp, aes(x = timetotrialcut, y = cellcycle,colour=site)) +
    geom_point(alpha = 0.7) +
  geom_line(aes(x=timetotrial,y=predcellcycle),linewidth = 1.2)+
    annotate("text",
             x = 40,
             y = 2.2,
             label = p_label,
             hjust = 0,
             size = 4) +  
  scale_color_manual(
                 values = c(
                     "KIDNEY" = "#4d9221",
                     "METASTASIS" = "#c51b7d"        ))+
    scale_x_continuous(
        breaks = c(0,30,60,90,120),
        labels = c("0","30","60","90",">120")
    ) +
    labs(
        x = "Recurrence Time (months)",
        y = "Cell Cycle",
  colour = "Sequencing\nSite"
    ) +
    coord_cartesian(ylim = c(-3,3), xlim = c(0,120)) +
    theme_minimal()

cellcycleprimonly

fit <- lm(angio ~ timetotrial, data = finalexp)
finalexp$predangio<-predict(fit,newdata = finalexp)
cbind(
  coef(fit),
  confint(fit)
)

anova(fit, test= "LRT")

summary(fit)



p_label <- "p = 1e-5"


angioprimonly <- ggplot(finalexp, aes(x = timetotrialcut, y = angio,colour=site)) +
    geom_point(alpha = 0.7) +
  geom_line(aes(x=timetotrial,y=predangio),linewidth = 1.2)+
    annotate("text",
             x = 40,
             y = 2.2,
             label = p_label,
             hjust = 0,
             size = 4) +  
  scale_color_manual(
                 values = c(
                     "KIDNEY" = "#4d9221",
                     "METASTASIS" = "#c51b7d"        ))+
    scale_x_continuous(
        breaks = c(0,30,60,90,120),
        labels = c("0","30","60","90",">120")
    ) +
    labs(
        x = "Recurrence Time (months)",
        y = "Angio",
  colour = "Sequencing\nSite"
    ) +
    coord_cartesian(ylim = c(-3,3), xlim = c(0,120)) +
    theme_minimal()

angioprimonly

fit <- lm(stroma ~ timetotrial, data = finalexp)
finalexp$predstroma<-predict(fit,newdata = finalexp)
cbind(
  coef(fit),
  confint(fit)
)

anova(fit, test= "LRT")

summary(fit)



p_label <- "p = 0.0076"


stromaprimonly <- ggplot(finalexp, aes(x = timetotrialcut, y = stroma,colour=site)) +
    geom_point(alpha = 0.7) +
  geom_line(aes(x=timetotrial,y=predstroma),linewidth = 1.2)+
    annotate("text",
             x = 40,
             y = 2.2,
             label = p_label,
             hjust = 0,
             size = 4) +  
  scale_color_manual(
                 values = c(
                     "KIDNEY" = "#4d9221",
                     "METASTASIS" = "#c51b7d"        ))+
    scale_x_continuous(
        breaks = c(0,30,60,90,120),
        labels = c("0","30","60","90",">120")
    ) +
    labs(
        x = "Recurrence Time (months)",
        y = "Stroma",
  colour = "Sequencing\nSite"
    ) +
    coord_cartesian(ylim = c(-3,3), xlim = c(0,120)) +
    theme_minimal()

stromaprimonly



#hallmark
design <- model.matrix(~ timetotrial
                       
                       , data = finalexp)

ftpm<-tpmjav_num[match(finalexp$natid,rownames(tpmjav_z)),]


fit_time <- lmFit(t(ftpm), design)
fit_time <- eBayes(fit_time)


rank_time <- fit_time$t[, "timetotrial"]
names(rank_time) <- rownames(fit_time)

rank_time <- sort(rank_time, decreasing = TRUE)


fg_time <- fgsea(
  pathways = hallmark_list,
  stats = rank_time
  , nperm = 1000000
)

fg_time_df <- as.data.frame(fg_time)

 sig_time   <- fg_time_df$pathway[fg_time_df$padj < 0.05]

fg_time_plot <- fg_time_df[match(pathways_keep, fg_time_df$pathway), ]

fg_time_plot$order<-match(fg_time_plot$pathway,nes_mat$pathway)

fg_time_plot$pathway_clean <- gsub("HALLMARK_", "", fg_time_plot$pathway)


fg_time_plot$nesflip<-(-fg_time_plot$NES)

hallmarkbarprimonly <- ggplot(fg_time_plot,
                      aes(x = nesflip, y = reorder(pathway_clean, order), fill = nesflip)) +
  geom_col() +
      geom_text(
    data = subset(fg_time_plot, padj < 0.05),
    aes(label = "*",
        hjust = ifelse(nesflip > 0, -0.3, 1.3)),
    size = 6,
    fontface = "bold"
  ) +
  scale_x_reverse() +
  scale_y_discrete(expand = expansion(mult = c(0.1, 0.0))) +
  scale_fill_gradient2(
    low = "#2166ac",
    mid = "gray95",
    high = "#b2182b",
    midpoint = 0,
        limits = c(-2.3, 4.4),
    name = "NES"
  ) +
  theme_minimal()  +
    annotate(
        "text",
        x = 0,
        y = 0,   # adjust depending on spacing
        label = "ŌåÉ Enriched Earlier     Enriched Later ŌåÆ",
        vjust = 1,  size = 3
    )+
  theme(
    plot.title.position = "plot",
    plot.title = element_text(hjust = 0)
  )+
  geom_vline(xintercept = 0, linetype = "dashed", color = "gray50")+
  labs(
    x = "",
    y = "",
    title = "Hallmark Pathway Enrichment Across Recurrence Time-\nJAVELIN Renal 101- Primary Tumor Sequencing Only"
  )+theme(legend.position = "none")

hallmarkbarprimonly

# Right column: 2x2 grid of the smaller plots
right_met <- plot_grid(
  angiometonly, cellcyclemetonly,
  stromametonly, wgiimetonly,
  ncol = 2, nrow = 2
)

# Combine: hallmark on left (spanning full height), 2x2 on right
combinemetsens <- plot_grid(
  hallmarkbarmetonly, right_met,
  ncol = 2,
  rel_widths = c(1, 1.2)
)

right_prim <- plot_grid(
  angioprimonly, cellcycleprimonly,
  stromaprimonly, wgiiprimonly,
  ncol = 2, nrow = 2
)

combineprimsens <- plot_grid(
  hallmarkbarprimonly, right_prim,
  ncol = 2,
  rel_widths = c(1, 1.2)
)

#sarcomatoid only
#sarcomatoid only
#sarcomatoid only
#sarcomatoid only
#sarcomatoid only
#sarcomatoid only

finalexp<-subset(final,final$natid %in% rownames(tpmjav_z))
finalexp <- subset(finalexp, categories != "De Novo Metastatic")
finalexp<-subset(finalexp, finalexp$sarc=="FALSE")
finalexp$timetotrial <- as.numeric(finalexp$timetotrial)
# 
# 
# fit <- lm(wgii ~ timetotrial, data = finalexp)
# finalexp$predwgii<-predict(fit,newdata = finalexp)
# cbind(
#   coef(fit),
#   confint(fit)
# )
# 
# anova(fit, test= "LRT")
# 
# summary(fit)
# 
# 
# 
# p_label <- "p = 0.062"
# 
# 
# wgiinosarc <- ggplot(finalexp, aes(x = timetotrialcut, y = wgii,colour=site)) +
#     geom_point(alpha = 0.7) +
#   geom_line(aes(x=timetotrial,y=predwgii),linewidth = 1.2)+
#     annotate("text",
#              x = 40,
#              y = 0.5,
#              label = p_label,
#              hjust = 0,
#              size = 4) +  
#   scale_color_manual(
#                  values = c(
#                      "KIDNEY" = "#4d9221",
#                      "METASTASIS" = "#c51b7d"        ))+
#     scale_x_continuous(
#         breaks = c(0,30,60,90,120),
#         labels = c("0","30","60","90",">120")
#     ) +
#     labs(
#         x = "Recurrence Time (months)",
#         y = "WGII",
#   colour = "Sequencing\nSite"
#     ) +
#     coord_cartesian(ylim = c(0,0.7), xlim = c(0,120)) +
#     theme_minimal()
# 
# wgiinosarc
# 
# fit <- lm(cellcycle ~ timetotrial, data = finalexp)
# finalexp$predcellcycle<-predict(fit,newdata = finalexp)
# cbind(
#   coef(fit),
#   confint(fit)
# )
# 
# anova(fit, test= "LRT")
# 
# summary(fit)
# 
# 
# 
# p_label <- "p = 0.003"
# 
# 
# cellcyclenosarc <- ggplot(finalexp, aes(x = timetotrialcut, y = cellcycle,colour=site)) +
#     geom_point(alpha = 0.7) +
#   geom_line(aes(x=timetotrial,y=predcellcycle),linewidth = 1.2)+
#     annotate("text",
#              x = 40,
#              y = 2.2,
#              label = p_label,
#              hjust = 0,
#              size = 4) +  
#   scale_color_manual(
#                  values = c(
#                      "KIDNEY" = "#4d9221",
#                      "METASTASIS" = "#c51b7d"        ))+
#     scale_x_continuous(
#         breaks = c(0,30,60,90,120),
#         labels = c("0","30","60","90",">120")
#     ) +
#     labs(
#         x = "Recurrence Time (months)",
#         y = "Cell Cycle",
#   colour = "Sequencing\nSite"
#     ) +
#     coord_cartesian(ylim = c(-3,3), xlim = c(0,120)) +
#     theme_minimal()
# 
# cellcyclenosarc
# 
# fit <- lm(angio ~ timetotrial, data = finalexp)
# finalexp$predangio<-predict(fit,newdata = finalexp)
# cbind(
#   coef(fit),
#   confint(fit)
# )
# 
# anova(fit, test= "LRT")
# 
# summary(fit)
# 
# 
# 
# p_label <- "p = 0.008"
# 
# 
# angionosarc <- ggplot(finalexp, aes(x = timetotrialcut, y = angio,colour=site)) +
#     geom_point(alpha = 0.7) +
#   geom_line(aes(x=timetotrial,y=predangio),linewidth = 1.2)+
#     annotate("text",
#              x = 40,
#              y = 2.2,
#              label = p_label,
#              hjust = 0,
#              size = 4) +  
#   scale_color_manual(
#                  values = c(
#                      "KIDNEY" = "#4d9221",
#                      "METASTASIS" = "#c51b7d"        ))+
#     scale_x_continuous(
#         breaks = c(0,30,60,90,120),
#         labels = c("0","30","60","90",">120")
#     ) +
#     labs(
#         x = "Recurrence Time (months)",
#         y = "Angio",
#   colour = "Sequencing\nSite"
#     ) +
#     coord_cartesian(ylim = c(-3,3), xlim = c(0,120)) +
#     theme_minimal()
# 
# angionosarc
# 
# fit <- lm(stroma ~ timetotrial, data = finalexp)
# finalexp$predstroma<-predict(fit,newdata = finalexp)
# cbind(
#   coef(fit),
#   confint(fit)
# )
# 
# anova(fit, test= "LRT")
# 
# summary(fit)
# 
# 
# 
# p_label <- "p = 0.0014"
# 
# stromanosarc <- ggplot(finalexp, aes(x = timetotrialcut, y = stroma,colour=site)) +
#     geom_point(alpha = 0.7) +
#   geom_line(aes(x=timetotrial,y=predstroma),linewidth = 1.2)+
#     annotate("text",
#              x = 40,
#              y = 2.2,
#              label = p_label,
#              hjust = 0,
#              size = 4) +  
#   scale_color_manual(
#                  values = c(
#                      "KIDNEY" = "#4d9221",
#                      "METASTASIS" = "#c51b7d"        ))+
#     scale_x_continuous(
#         breaks = c(0,30,60,90,120),
#         labels = c("0","30","60","90",">120")
#     ) +
#     labs(
#         x = "Recurrence Time (months)",
#         y = "Stroma",
#   colour = "Sequencing\nSite"
#     ) +
#     coord_cartesian(ylim = c(-3,3), xlim = c(0,120)) +
#     theme_minimal()
# 
# stromanosarc

#hallmark
design <- model.matrix(~ timetotrial+site
                       
                       , data = finalexp)

ftpm<-tpmjav_num[match(finalexp$natid,rownames(tpmjav_z)),]


fit_time <- lmFit(t(ftpm), design)
fit_time <- eBayes(fit_time)


rank_time <- fit_time$t[, "timetotrial"]
names(rank_time) <- rownames(fit_time)

rank_time <- sort(rank_time, decreasing = TRUE)


fg_time <- fgsea(
  pathways = hallmark_list,
  stats = rank_time, nperm = 1000000
)

fg_time_df <- as.data.frame(fg_time)

 sig_time   <- fg_time_df$pathway[fg_time_df$padj < 0.05]

fg_time_plot <- fg_time_df[match(pathways_keep, fg_time_df$pathway), ]

fg_time_plot$order<-match(fg_time_plot$pathway,nes_mat$pathway)

fg_time_plot$pathway_clean <- gsub("HALLMARK_", "", fg_time_plot$pathway)


fg_time_plot$nesflip<-(-fg_time_plot$NES)

hallmarkbarnosarc <- ggplot(fg_time_plot,
                      aes(x = nesflip, y = reorder(pathway_clean, order), fill = nesflip)) +
  geom_col() +
      geom_text(
    data = subset(fg_time_plot, padj < 0.05),
    aes(label = "*",
        hjust = ifelse(nesflip > 0, -0.3, 1.3)),
    size = 6,
    fontface = "bold"
  ) +
  scale_x_reverse() +
  scale_y_discrete(expand = expansion(mult = c(0.1, 0.0))) +
  scale_fill_gradient2(
    low = "#2166ac",
    mid = "gray95",
    high = "#b2182b",
    midpoint = 0,
        limits = c(-2.3, 4.3),
    name = "NES"
  ) +
  theme_minimal()  +
    annotate(
        "text",
        x = 0,
        y = 0,   # adjust depending on spacing
        label = "ŌåÉ Enriched Earlier     Enriched Later ŌåÆ",
        vjust = 1,  size = 3
    )+
  theme(
    plot.title.position = "plot",
    plot.title = element_text(hjust = 0)
  )+
  geom_vline(xintercept = 0, linetype = "dashed", color = "gray50")+
  labs(
    x = "",
    y = "",
    title = "Hallmark Pathway Enrichment Across Recurrence Time-\nJAVELIN Renal 101- Excluding Sarcomatoid (n=319)"
  )+theme(legend.position = "none")


##high grade only (3/4)

##high grade only (3/4)
##high grade only (3/4)
##high grade only (3/4)
##high grade only (3/4)


finalexp<-subset(final,final$natid %in% rownames(tpmjav_z))
finalexp <- subset(finalexp, categories != "De Novo Metastatic")
finalexp<-subset(finalexp, finalexp$grade %in% c("GRADE 3","GRADE 4"))
finalexp$timetotrial <- as.numeric(finalexp$timetotrial)

#hallmark
design <- model.matrix(~ timetotrial+site
                       
                       , data = finalexp)

ftpm<-tpmjav_num[match(finalexp$natid,rownames(tpmjav_z)),]


fit_time <- lmFit(t(ftpm), design)
fit_time <- eBayes(fit_time)


rank_time <- fit_time$t[, "timetotrial"]
names(rank_time) <- rownames(fit_time)

rank_time <- sort(rank_time, decreasing = TRUE)


fg_time <- fgsea(
  pathways = hallmark_list,
  stats = rank_time, nperm = 1000000
)

fg_time_df <- as.data.frame(fg_time)

 sig_time   <- fg_time_df$pathway[fg_time_df$padj < 0.05]

fg_time_plot <- fg_time_df[match(pathways_keep, fg_time_df$pathway), ]

fg_time_plot$order<-match(fg_time_plot$pathway,nes_mat$pathway)

fg_time_plot$pathway_clean <- gsub("HALLMARK_", "", fg_time_plot$pathway)


fg_time_plot$nesflip<-(-fg_time_plot$NES)

hallmarkbarhighgrade <- ggplot(fg_time_plot,
                      aes(x = nesflip, y = reorder(pathway_clean, order), fill = nesflip)) +
  geom_col() +
      geom_text(
    data = subset(fg_time_plot, padj < 0.05),
    aes(label = "*",
        hjust = ifelse(nesflip > 0, -0.3, 1.3)),
    size = 6,
    fontface = "bold"
  ) +
  scale_x_reverse() +
  scale_y_discrete(expand = expansion(mult = c(0.1, 0.0))) +
  scale_fill_gradient2(
    low = "#2166ac",
    mid = "gray95",
    high = "#b2182b",
    midpoint = 0,
        limits = c(-2.3, 4.3),
    name = "NES"
  ) +
  theme_minimal()  +
    annotate(
        "text",
        x = 0,
        y = 0,   # adjust depending on spacing
        label = "ŌåÉ Enriched Earlier     Enriched Later ŌåÆ",
        vjust = 1,  size = 3
    )+
  theme(
    plot.title.position = "plot",
    plot.title = element_text(hjust = 0)
  )+
  geom_vline(xintercept = 0, linetype = "dashed", color = "gray50")+
  labs(
    x = "",
    y = "",
    title = "Hallmark Pathway Enrichment Across Recurrence Time-\nJAVELIN Renal 101- High-Grade Only (ISUP/Fuhrman 3 or 4; n=220)"
  )+theme(legend.position = "none")

hallmarkbarhighgrade

#low grade only


finalexp<-subset(final,final$natid %in% rownames(tpmjav_z))
finalexp <- subset(finalexp, categories != "De Novo Metastatic")
finalexp<-subset(finalexp, finalexp$grade %in% c("GRADE 1","GRADE 2"))
finalexp$timetotrial <- as.numeric(finalexp$timetotrial)

#hallmark
design <- model.matrix(~ timetotrial+site
                       
                       , data = finalexp)

ftpm<-tpmjav_num[match(finalexp$natid,rownames(tpmjav_z)),]


fit_time <- lmFit(t(ftpm), design)
fit_time <- eBayes(fit_time)


rank_time <- fit_time$t[, "timetotrial"]
names(rank_time) <- rownames(fit_time)

rank_time <- sort(rank_time, decreasing = TRUE)


fg_time <- fgsea(
  pathways = hallmark_list,
  stats = rank_time, nperm = 1000000
)

fg_time_df <- as.data.frame(fg_time)

 sig_time   <- fg_time_df$pathway[fg_time_df$padj < 0.05]

fg_time_plot <- fg_time_df[match(pathways_keep, fg_time_df$pathway), ]

fg_time_plot$order<-match(fg_time_plot$pathway,nes_mat$pathway)

fg_time_plot$pathway_clean <- gsub("HALLMARK_", "", fg_time_plot$pathway)


fg_time_plot$nesflip<-(-fg_time_plot$NES)

hallmarkbarlowgrade <- ggplot(fg_time_plot,
                      aes(x = nesflip, y = reorder(pathway_clean, order), fill = nesflip)) +
  geom_col() +
      geom_text(
    data = subset(fg_time_plot, padj < 0.05),
    aes(label = "*",
        hjust = ifelse(nesflip > 0, -0.3, 1.3)),
    size = 6,
    fontface = "bold"
  ) +
  scale_x_reverse() +
  scale_y_discrete(expand = expansion(mult = c(0.1, 0.0))) +
  scale_fill_gradient2(
    low = "#2166ac",
    mid = "gray95",
    high = "#b2182b",
    midpoint = 0,
        limits = c(-2.3, 4.3),
    name = "NES"
  ) +
  theme_minimal()  +
    annotate(
        "text",
        x = 0,
        y = 0,   # adjust depending on spacing
        label = "ŌåÉ Enriched Earlier     Enriched Later ŌåÆ",
        vjust = 1,  size = 3
    )+
  theme(
    plot.title.position = "plot",
    plot.title = element_text(hjust = 0)
  )+
  geom_vline(xintercept = 0, linetype = "dashed", color = "gray50")+
  labs(
    x = "",
    y = "",
    title = "Hallmark Pathway Enrichment Across Recurrence Time-\nJAVELIN Renal 101- Low-Grade Only (ISUP/Fuhrman 1 or 2; n=117)"
  )+theme(legend.position = "none")

hallmarkbarlowgrade


combhisthallmark <- plot_grid(hallmarkbar,
  hallmarkbarnosarc, hallmarkbarhighgrade,
  hallmarkbarlowgrade,
  ncol = 2
)

```


```{r IMM151 molecular cluster analysis}


#random forest
#https://www.projectpro.io/recipes/perform-random-forest-r

immexp <- read_csv("/Users/smonda/Library/CloudStorage/OneDrive-MichiganMedicine/Research/M vs P/Final/IMM151_TPM.csv")

#already looks log2 tpm

immexp<-as.data.frame(immexp)
#remove na genes
immexp<-subset(immexp,!is.na(immexp$symbol))
#removes duplicated genes
immexp<-subset(immexp,!duplicated(immexp$symbol))

#row names to genes
rownames(immexp) <- immexp$symbol


#can only run this part once
immexp<- immexp[,!colnames(immexp) %in% c("symbol","gene_name","...1")]

#z-score transformed
immexpz<-data.frame(scale(data.frame(t(immexp))))

library(matrixStats)

immclin <- read_csv("/Users/smonda/Library/CloudStorage/OneDrive-MichiganMedicine/Research/M vs P/Final/IMM151_clinical.csv", 
                    skip = 3)

immclin<- subset(immclin,immclin$RNASEQ_SAMPLE_ID %in% colnames(immexp))
#10% most variable genes in IMM151
imm10genes<-names(sort(rowVars(as.matrix(immexp)),decreasing=TRUE)[1:(nrow(immexp)/10)])
imm10genes<-subset(imm10genes,imm10genes %in% colnames(immexpz))
sharedimm10genes<-intersect(colnames(tpmjav_z),imm10genes)

#then isolates to shared genes
#using javelin genes
immnmftarget<-as.factor(immclin$NMF_GROUP)

training<-immexpz[,sharedimm10genes]
#reorder to align with immclin
training<-training[immclin$RNASEQ_SAMPLE_ID,]

model<-randomForest(immnmftarget~.,data= training)

#OOB estimate of  error rate: 17.5%

#input data
rfinput<-tpmjav_z[,sharedimm10genes]
# rfinput<-tpm_z[,sharedimm10genes]

#as.data.frame(lapply(nexpz[,PMgenes], type.convert, as.is = TRUE))

nmf<-data.frame(predict(model,newdata=rfinput))

nmf$id<-rownames(rfinput)

# cancerhx$nmf<-nmf$predict.model..newdata...rfinput.[match(cancerhx$USUBJID,nmf$id)]

final$nmf<-nmf$predict.model..newdata...rfinput.[match(final$natid,nmf$id)]

finals<-subset(final,!is.na(final$nmf))

categories_plot<-finals %>%
    mutate(
        categories_plot = factor(
            categories_plot,
            levels = c("De Novo Metastatic","early","intermediate","late"),
            labels = c("De Novo Metastatic",
                       "Early Recurrent",
                       "Intermediate Recurrent",
                       "Late Recurrent")
        ),
        site = factor(site, levels = c("KIDNEY","METASTASIS"))
    ) %>%
    count(categories_plot, site, nmf) %>%
    group_by(categories_plot, site) %>%
    mutate(prop = n / sum(n)) %>%
    ggplot(
        aes(
            x = interaction(categories_plot, site),
            y = prop,
            fill = nmf
        )
    ) +
    geom_col(color = "black") +
    
    # Y axis as %
    scale_y_continuous(labels = label_percent()) +
    
    # Only show recurrence labels (remove KIDNEY/METASTASIS)
    scale_x_discrete(
        labels = function(x) {
            parts <- strsplit(x, "\\.")
            sapply(parts, function(p) p[1])
        }
    ) +
    
    labs(
        x = NULL,
        y = "Percentage",
        fill = "NMF subtype",
        title = "IMM151 Molecular Cluster Distribution by Recurrence Timing and Site in JAVELIN Renal 101 (n=599)"
    ) +
    
    # Group labels underneath (PRIMARY vs METASTATIC)
    annotate(
        "text",
        x = c(2.5, 6.5),
        y = -0.01,
        label = c("Primary Tumor Sequencing",
                  "Metastatic Site Sequencing"),
        vjust = 1,
        size = 3.5
    ) +
    
    # Allow drawing outside panel
    coord_cartesian(ylim = c(0, 1), clip = "off") +
    
    theme_minimal() +
    theme(
        axis.text.x = element_text(size = 10),
        plot.margin = ggplot2::margin(10, 10, 50, 10)
    )+ geom_vline(xintercept = 4.5, linewidth = 0.8, color = "black")+
  scale_fill_manual(
  values = scales::hue_pal()(7),  # keeps default-like colors
  breaks = c("1","2","3","4","5","6","7"),
  labels = c(
    "1. Angio/stromal",
    "2. Angio",
    "3. Compl./ox.",
    "4. T-effector/prolif.",
    "5. Prolif.",
    "6. Stromal/prolif.",
    "7. snoRNA"
  )
)

categories_plot

imm010plot<-imm010placeborec
imm010plot<-imm010plot[!is.na(imm010plot$NMF_SUBTYPE),]

imm010categories_plotplacebo<-imm010plot %>%
    mutate(
        categories_plot = factor(
            categories_plot,
            levels = c("early","intermediate"),
            labels = c(
                       "Early Recurrent",
                       "Intermediate Recurrent")),
                    NMF_SUBTYPE = factor(NMF_SUBTYPE, levels = c("1","2","3","4","5","6","7")
        )
    ) %>%
    count(categories_plot, NMF_SUBTYPE) %>%
    group_by(categories_plot) %>%
    mutate(prop = n / sum(n)) %>%
    ggplot(
        aes(
            x = interaction(categories_plot),
            y = prop,
            fill = NMF_SUBTYPE
        )
    ) +
    geom_col(color = "black") +
    
    # Y axis as %
    scale_y_continuous(labels = label_percent()) +
    
    # Only show recurrence labels (remove KIDNEY/METASTASIS)
    scale_x_discrete(
        labels = function(x) {
            parts <- strsplit(x, "\\.")
            sapply(parts, function(p) p[1])
        }
    ) +
    
    labs(
        x = NULL,
        y = "Percentage",
        fill = "NMF subtype",
        title = "IMM151 Molecular Cluster in IMmotion010 (placebo, n=87)"
    ) +
    

    
    # Allow drawing outside panel
    coord_cartesian(ylim = c(0, 1), clip = "off") +
    
    theme_minimal() +
    theme(
        axis.text.x = element_text(size = 10),
        plot.margin = ggplot2::margin(10, 10, 50, 10))+
  scale_fill_manual(
  values = scales::hue_pal()(7),  # keeps default-like colors
  breaks = c("1","2","3","4","5","6","7"),
  labels = c(
    "1. Angio/stromal",
    "2. Angio",
    "3. Compl./ox.",
    "4. T-effector/prolif.",
    "5. Prolif.",
    "6. Stromal/prolif.",
    "7. snoRNA"
  )
)



imm010categories_plotplacebo

imm010plot<-imm010atezorec
imm010plot<-imm010plot[!is.na(imm010plot$NMF_SUBTYPE),]

imm010categories_plotatezo<-imm010plot %>%
    mutate(
        categories_plot = factor(
            categories_plot,
            levels = c("early","intermediate"),
            labels = c(
                       "Early Recurrent",
                       "Intermediate Recurrent")),
                    NMF_SUBTYPE = factor(NMF_SUBTYPE, levels = c("1","2","3","4","5","6","7")
        )
    ) %>%
    count(categories_plot, NMF_SUBTYPE) %>%
    group_by(categories_plot) %>%
    mutate(prop = n / sum(n)) %>%
    ggplot(
        aes(
            x = interaction(categories_plot),
            y = prop,
            fill = NMF_SUBTYPE
        )
    ) +
    geom_col(color = "black") +
    
    # Y axis as %
    scale_y_continuous(labels = label_percent()) +
    
    # Only show recurrence labels (remove KIDNEY/METASTASIS)
    scale_x_discrete(
        labels = function(x) {
            parts <- strsplit(x, "\\.")
            sapply(parts, function(p) p[1])
        }
    ) +
    
    labs(
        x = NULL,
        y = "Percentage",
        fill = "NMF subtype",
        title = "IMM151 Molecular Cluster in IMmotion010 (atezo, n=76)"
    ) +
    

    
    # Allow drawing outside panel
    coord_cartesian(ylim = c(0, 1), clip = "off") +
    
    theme_minimal() +
    theme(
        axis.text.x = element_text(size = 10),
        plot.margin = ggplot2::margin(10, 10, 50, 10))+
  scale_fill_manual(
  values = scales::hue_pal()(7),  # keeps default-like colors
  breaks = c("1","2","3","4","5","6","7"),
  labels = c(
    "1. Angio/stromal",
    "2. Angio",
    "3. Compl./ox.",
    "4. T-effector/prolif.",
    "5. Prolif.",
    "6. Stromal/prolif.",
    "7. snoRNA"
  )
)

#create the same thing IMM010 data
imm010categories_plotatezo

```

## Establishing adjusted IMDC risk factors are can be included as continuous variable with linear effect in downstream analyses
```{r IMDC linear vs spline assessment}

#Frank Harrel RMS was used for this approach- plotting the HR CI 95% and assessing non-linearity with ANOVA

dd <- datadist(fpfs)
options(datadist = "dd")

fit_spline <- cph(Surv(as.numeric(AVALC), CNSR == "0") ~ 
                  categories + ARMCD + rcs(imdc,3),
                  data = fpfs,
                  x=TRUE, y=TRUE)



p_imdc <- Predict(fit_spline, imdc, fun = exp)

plot(p_imdc,
     xlab = "Modified IMDC (0ŌĆō4)",
     ylab = "Hazard Ratio",
     main = "Effect of Modified IMDC on PFS",
     lwd = 2)

anova(fit_spline)

```

## Prognostic Analysis- PFS is primary outcome, first - survival ~ recurrence_category + arm
second - survival ~ recurrence_category + arm + imdc

Then repeat for DSS and OS

You can also embed plots, for example:



```{r prognostic cox analysis}
#PFS primary
fpfs$ARMCD <- factor(fpfs$ARMCD)
fpfs$ARMCD <- relevel(fpfs$ARMCD, ref="Sunitinib")
fos$ARMCD <- factor(fos$ARMCD)
fos$ARMCD <- relevel(fos$ARMCD, ref = "Sunitinib")

#unadjusted-only arm
fpfs$categories <- factor(fpfs$categories)
fpfs$categories <- relevel(fpfs$categories, ref = "De Novo Metastatic")

foss<-fos[fpfs$ARMCD=="Sunitinib",]
fosa<-fos[fpfs$ARMCD!="Sunitinib",]
fpfss<-fpfs[fpfs$ARMCD=="Sunitinib",]
fpfsa<-fpfs[fpfs$ARMCD!="Sunitinib",]


coxpfs<-coxph(Surv(as.numeric(AVALC), CNSR == "0"
           ) ~              ARMCD+categories     ,
                    data = fpfs)
coxpfs
summary(coxpfs)

#adjusted- arm + imdc

coxadjpfs<-coxph(Surv(as.numeric(AVALC), CNSR == "0"
           ) ~              ARMCD+categories  +imdc   ,
                    data = fpfs)
coxadjpfs
summary(coxadjpfs)

#OS- secondary 1

#unadjusted-only arm
coxos<-coxph(Surv(as.numeric(AVALC), CNSR == "0"
           ) ~              ARMCD+categories     ,
                    data = fos)
coxos
summary(coxos)

#adjusted- arm + imdc

coxadjos<-coxph(Surv(as.numeric(AVALC), CNSR == "0"
           ) ~              ARMCD+categories  +imdc   ,
                    data = fos)
coxadjos
summary(coxadjos)


#DSS- secondary 2
#unadjusted-only arm
coxdss<-coxph(Surv(as.numeric(AVALC), CNSR == "0"& ADTHCAUS == "DISEASE PROGRESSION"
           ) ~              ARMCD+categories     ,
                    data = fos)
coxdss
summary(coxdss)

#adjusted- arm + imdc

coxadjdss<-coxph(Surv(as.numeric(AVALC), CNSR == "0"& ADTHCAUS == "DISEASE PROGRESSION"
           ) ~              ARMCD+categories  +imdc   ,
                    data = fos)
coxadjdss
summary(coxadjdss)


# Global test
#now global tests for the impact of category
# Reduced model (no categories)
cox_pfs_no_cat <- coxph(
  Surv(as.numeric(AVALC), CNSR == "0") ~ ARMCD,
  data = fpfs
)


anova(cox_pfs_no_cat, coxpfs, test = "LRT")

cox_pfs_no_cat_adj <- coxph(
  Surv(as.numeric(AVALC), CNSR == "0") ~ ARMCD + imdc,
  data = fpfs
)

anova(cox_pfs_no_cat_adj, coxadjpfs, test = "LRT")

cox_os_no_cat <- coxph(
  Surv(as.numeric(AVALC), CNSR == "0") ~ ARMCD,
  data = fos
)

anova(cox_os_no_cat, coxos, test = "LRT")

cox_os_no_cat_adj <- coxph(
  Surv(as.numeric(AVALC), CNSR == "0") ~ ARMCD + imdc,
  data = fos
)

anova(cox_os_no_cat_adj, coxadjos, test = "LRT")

cox_dss_no_cat <- coxph(
  Surv(as.numeric(AVALC),
       CNSR == "0" & ADTHCAUS == "DISEASE PROGRESSION") ~ ARMCD,
  data = fos
)

anova(cox_dss_no_cat, coxdss, test = "LRT")

cox_dss_no_cat_adj <- coxph(
  Surv(as.numeric(AVALC),
       CNSR == "0" & ADTHCAUS == "DISEASE PROGRESSION") ~ ARMCD + imdc,
  data = fos
)

anova(cox_dss_no_cat_adj, coxadjdss, test = "LRT")

```
#KM Curves for Prognostic Assessment
``` {r KM prognostic }


um_colors <- c(
  "#00274C",  # Michigan Blue
  "#FFCB05",  # Michigan Maize
  "#6CACE4",  # light blue accent
  "#9A3324"   # optional burgundy accent (nice contrast)
)


pfsprog <- 
  ggsurvplot(
  survfit(Surv(as.numeric(AVALC), CNSR == "0") ~ categories, data = fpfs),
  data = fpfs,
  risk.table = TRUE,
  xlab = "Time (months)",
  ylab = "Progression Free Survival",
  title = "Progression-Free Survival by Recurrence Status",
  legend.title = "",
  xlim = c(0, 60),
  break.time.by = 12,
  palette = um_colors,
  legend.labs = c(
    "De Novo Metastatic",
    "Early Recurrent",
    "Intermediate Recurrent",
    "Late Recurrent"
  ),
  surv.scale = "percent",
  ggtheme = theme_minimal(base_size = 14)
)

pfsprog

pfsprogs <-   ggsurvplot(
  survfit(Surv(as.numeric(AVALC), CNSR == "0") ~ categories, data = fpfss),
  data = fpfs,
  risk.table = TRUE,
  xlab = "Time (months)",
  ylab = "Progression Free Survival",
  title = "Progression-Free Survival by Recurrence Status\nSunitinib Arm (n=355)",
  legend.title = "",
  xlim = c(0, 60),
  break.time.by = 12,
  palette = um_colors,
  legend.labs = c(
    "De Novo Metastatic",
    "Early Recurrent",
    "Intermediate Recurrent",
    "Late Recurrent"
  ),
  surv.scale = "percent",
  ggtheme = theme_minimal(base_size = 14)
)

pfsprogs

pfsproga <-   ggsurvplot(
  survfit(Surv(as.numeric(AVALC), CNSR == "0") ~ categories, data = fpfsa),
  data = fpfs,
  risk.table = TRUE,
  xlab = "Time (months)",
  ylab = "Progression Free Survival",
  title = "Progression-Free Survival by Recurrence Status\nAvelumab+Axitinib Arm (n=361)",
  legend.title = "",
  xlim = c(0, 60),
  break.time.by = 12,
  palette = um_colors,
  legend.labs = c(
    "De Novo Metastatic",
    "Early Recurrent",
    "Intermediate Recurrent",
    "Late Recurrent"
  ),
  surv.scale = "percent",
  ggtheme = theme_minimal(base_size = 14)
)

pfsproga


osprog <- ggsurvplot(
  survfit(Surv(as.numeric(AVALC), CNSR == "0") ~ categories, data = fos),
  data = fos,
  risk.table = TRUE,
  xlab = "Time (months)",
  ylab = "Overall Survival",
  title = "Overall Survival by Recurrence Status\n(n=706)",
  legend.title = "",
  xlim = c(0, 60),
  break.time.by = 12,
  palette = um_colors,
  legend.labs = c(
    "De Novo Metastatic",
    "Early Recurrent",
    "Intermediate Recurrent",
    "Late Recurrent"
  ),
  surv.scale = "percent",
  ggtheme = theme_minimal(base_size = 14)
)
osprog

osproga <- ggsurvplot(
  survfit(Surv(as.numeric(AVALC), CNSR == "0") ~ categories, data = fosa),
  data = fos,
  risk.table = TRUE,
  xlab = "Time (months)",
  ylab = "Overall Survival",
  title = "Overall Survival by Recurrence Status Avelumab Arm",
  legend.title = "",
  xlim = c(0, 60),
  break.time.by = 12,
  palette = um_colors,
  legend.labs = c(
    "De Novo Metastatic",
    "Early Recurrent",
    "Intermediate Recurrent",
    "Late Recurrent"
  ),
  surv.scale = "percent",
  ggtheme = theme_minimal(base_size = 14)
)
osproga

osprogs <- ggsurvplot(
  survfit(Surv(as.numeric(AVALC), CNSR == "0") ~ categories, data = foss),
  data = fos,
  risk.table = TRUE,
  xlab = "Time (months)",
  ylab = "Overall Survival",
  title = "Overall Survival by Recurrence Status-Sunitinib Arm",
  legend.title = "",
  xlim = c(0, 60),
  break.time.by = 12,
  palette = um_colors,
  legend.labs = c(
    "De Novo Metastatic",
    "Early Recurrent",
    "Intermediate Recurrent",
    "Late Recurrent"
  ),
  surv.scale = "percent",
  ggtheme = theme_minimal(base_size = 14)
)
osprogs


dssprog <- ggsurvplot(
  survfit(Surv(as.numeric(AVALC), CNSR == "0"&fos$ADTHCAUS=="DISEASE PROGRESSION") ~ categories, data = fos),
  data = fos,
  risk.table = TRUE,
  xlab = "Time (months)",
  ylab = "Overall Survival",
  title = "Disease Specific Survival by Recurrence Status",
  legend.title = "",
  xlim = c(0, 60),
  break.time.by = 12,
  palette = um_colors,
  legend.labs = c(
    "De Novo Metastatic",
    "Early Recurrent",
    "Intermediate Recurrent",
    "Late Recurrent"
  ),
  surv.scale = "percent",
  ggtheme = theme_minimal(base_size = 14)
)

dssprog
pfs_full <- plot_grid(
  pfsprog$plot,
  pfsprog$table,
  ncol = 1,
  rel_heights = c(3, 1)
)

os_full <- plot_grid(
  osprog$plot,
  osprog$table,
  ncol = 1,
  rel_heights = c(3, 1)
)

dss_full <- plot_grid(
  dssprog$plot,
  dssprog$table,
  ncol = 1,
  rel_heights = c(3, 1)
)

pfss_full <- plot_grid(
  pfsprogs$plot,
  pfsprogs$table,
  ncol = 1,
  rel_heights = c(3, 1)
)

pfsa_full <- plot_grid(
  pfsproga$plot,
  pfsproga$table,
  ncol = 1,
  rel_heights = c(3, 1)
)

p_all <- plot_grid(
  pfss_full,
  pfsa_full,
  os_full,
    nrow = 1,
  align = "hv",
  axis = "tblr"
)

p_all

```


``` {r PFS HR subgroup analysis}

df <- data.frame(fpfs)
df$ARMCD <- factor(df$ARMCD, levels = c("Sunitinib","Avelumab + Axitinib"))

# Ensure expected types
df <- df %>%
  mutate(
    # event indicator: TRUE if event, FALSE if censored
    event = CNSR %in% c("0", 0),
    time  = as.numeric(AVALC),
    ARMCD = factor(ARMCD),
    categories = factor(categories,
                        levels = c("De Novo Metastatic","early","intermediate","late"))
  )

# >>>> OPTIONAL: set your desired reference arm here (edit "Control" as needed) <<<<
# df$ARMCD <- relevel(df$ARMCD, ref = "Control")

# Helper: fit Cox in a subset and extract HR (with CI) for each non-reference level of ARMCD
fit_subset <- function(dat, subgroup_label) {
  dat <- dat %>% filter(!is.na(time), !is.na(event), !is.na(ARMCD))
  if (nlevels(dat$ARMCD) < 2L || nrow(dat) == 0L) {
    return(tibble(subgroup = character(), arm = character(),
                  hr = numeric(), lo = numeric(), hi = numeric(),
                  p = numeric(), n = integer(), events = integer()))
  }
  fit <- coxph(Surv(time, event) ~ ARMCD, data = dat)
  s   <- summary(fit)
  
  # rows correspond to comparisons vs reference arm
  comp_rows <- rownames(s$coefficients)
  comp_arm  <- sub("^ARMCD", "", comp_rows)
  
  # confint for coxph returns log-scale; exponentiate to HR scale
  ci <- suppressMessages(confint(fit))
  tibble(
    subgroup = subgroup_label,
    arm      = comp_arm,
    hr       = as.numeric(exp(s$coefficients[, "coef"])),
    lo       = as.numeric(exp(ci[, 1])),
    hi       = as.numeric(exp(ci[, 2])),
    p        = as.numeric(s$coefficients[, "Pr(>|z|)"]),
    n        = nrow(dat),
    events   = sum(dat$event, na.rm = TRUE)
  )
}

# Define the sets: overall + each category
sets <- list(
  "All evaluated patients"        = df,
  "De Novo Metastatic"  = df %>% filter(categories == "De Novo Metastatic"),
  "Early"               = df %>% filter(categories == "early"),
  "Intermediate"            = df %>% filter(categories == "intermediate"),
  "Late"                = df %>% filter(categories == "late")
)

# Fit all
res <- bind_rows(Map(fit_subset, sets, names(sets)))

# Make pretty labels and plotting order
res <- res %>%
  mutate(
    line = paste0(subgroup, 
                  "   (n=", n, ", events=", events, ")"),
    line = factor(line, levels = rev(unique(line))) # top=overall
  )

# Axis limits (log scale) with a little padding
xmin <- max(min(res$lo, na.rm = TRUE), 0.05)
xmax <- max(res$hi, na.rm = TRUE) * 1.15

res <- res %>%
  mutate(
    hr_label = sprintf("%.2f (%.2fŌĆō%.2f)", hr, lo, hi)
  )

# Forest plot
forestplot<-ggplot(res, aes(y = line, x = hr)) +
    
    # HR text column on left
    geom_text(aes(x = 0.07, label = hr_label),
              hjust = 0,
              size = 3.5) +
    
    # CI + point
    geom_point(size = 2.5) +
    geom_errorbarh(aes(xmin = lo, xmax = hi), height = 0.18) +
    
    # Reference line
    geom_vline(xintercept = 1, linetype = "dashed") +
    annotate(
  "text",
  x = 0.88,
  y = 0.3,   # slightly below lowest row
  label = "Avelumab + Axitinib Better    <=>    Sunitinib Better",
  vjust =0,
  size = 3.5
)+
coord_cartesian(clip = "off") +
    # Log scale with extra room on left
    scale_x_log10(
        limits = c(0.07, 2),
        breaks = c(0.25, 0.5, 1, 1.5, 2),
        minor_breaks = NULL
    ) +
    
    labs(
        x = NULL,
        y = NULL,
        title = "Recurrence Subgroup Analysis for Progression-Free Survival",
    ) +
    
    theme_minimal(base_size = 12) +
    theme(
        panel.grid.minor = element_blank(),
        plot.title = element_text(hjust = 0),
        axis.text.y = element_text(hjust = 0),
        plot.margin = ggplot2::margin(5.5, 30, 5.5, 30)# creates left padding
    )+
  geom_text(
  data = data.frame(),
  aes(x = 0.07, 
      y = length(levels(res$line)) + 0.4),
  label = "HR (95% CI)",
  hjust = 0,
  fontface = "bold",
  size = 3.8,
  inherit.aes = FALSE
)
  

fpfsil<-subset(fpfs,fpfs$categories %in% c("intermediate","late"))

fpfsde<-subset(fpfs,!fpfs$categories %in% c("intermediate","late"))

fpfsi<-subset(fpfs,fpfs$categories %in% c("intermediate"))

fpfse<-subset(fpfs,fpfs$categories %in% c("early"))

fpfsl<-subset(fpfs,fpfs$categories %in% c("late"))

fpfsd<-subset(fpfs,fpfs$categories %in% c("De Novo Metastatic"))



pfsil<-ggsurvplot(
  survfit(Surv(as.numeric(AVALC), CNSR == "0") ~ ARMCD, data = fpfsil),
  data = fpfsil,
  risk.table = TRUE,
    title="Intermediate + Late Recurrence (n=283)",
  xlab = "Time (months)",
  ylab = "Progression Free Survival",
    pval = TRUE,
  # title = "Progression-Free Survival by Recurrence Status",
  legend.title = "",
  xlim = c(0, 60),
  break.time.by = 12,
  palette = um_colors,
  legend.labs = c(
    "Sunitinib",
        "Avelumab + Axitinib"
  ),
  surv.scale = "percent",
  ggtheme = theme_minimal(base_size = 14)
)

pfsde<-ggsurvplot(
  survfit(Surv(as.numeric(AVALC), CNSR == "0") ~ ARMCD, data = fpfsde),
  data = fpfsde,
  risk.table = TRUE,
  title="De Novo + Early Recurrence (n=433)",
  xlab = "Time (months)",
  ylab = "Progression Free Survival",
  pval = TRUE,
  # title = "Progression-Free Survival by Recurrence Status",
  legend.title = "",
  xlim = c(0, 60),
  break.time.by = 12,
  palette = um_colors,
  legend.labs = c(
    "Sunitinib",
    "Avelumab + Axitinib"
      ),
  surv.scale = "percent",
  ggtheme = theme_minimal(base_size = 14)
)


pfse<-ggsurvplot(
  survfit(Surv(as.numeric(AVALC), CNSR == "0") ~ ARMCD, data = fpfse),
  data = fpfse,
  risk.table = TRUE,
  title="Early Recurrence (n=137)",
  xlab = "Time (months)",
  ylab = "Progression Free Survival",
    pval = TRUE,
  # title = "Progression-Free Survival by Recurrence Status",
  legend.title = "",
  xlim = c(0, 60),
  break.time.by = 12,
  palette = um_colors,
  legend.labs = c(
    "Sunitinib",
    "Avelumab + Axitinib"
      ),
  surv.scale = "percent",
  ggtheme = theme_minimal(base_size = 14)
)


pfsd<-ggsurvplot(
  survfit(Surv(as.numeric(AVALC), CNSR == "0") ~ ARMCD, data = fpfsd),
  data = fpfsd,
  risk.table = TRUE,
  title="De Novo Metastatic (n=296)",
  xlab = "Time (months)",
    pval = TRUE,
  ylab = "Progression Free Survival",
  # title = "Progression-Free Survival by Recurrence Status",
  legend.title = "",
  xlim = c(0, 60),
  break.time.by = 12,
  palette = um_colors,
  legend.labs = c(
    "Sunitinib",
    "Avelumab + Axitinib"
      ),
  surv.scale = "percent",
  ggtheme = theme_minimal(base_size = 14)
)

pfsi<-ggsurvplot(
  survfit(Surv(as.numeric(AVALC), CNSR == "0") ~ ARMCD, data = fpfsi),
  data = fpfsi,
  risk.table = TRUE,
  title="Intermediate Recurrence (n=139)",
  xlab = "Time (months)",
    pval = TRUE,
  ylab = "Progression Free Survival",
  # title = "Progression-Free Survival by Recurrence Status",
  legend.title = "",
  xlim = c(0, 60),
  break.time.by = 12,
  palette = um_colors,
  legend.labs = c(
    "Sunitinib",
    "Avelumab + Axitinib"
      ),
  surv.scale = "percent",
  ggtheme = theme_minimal(base_size = 14)
)


pfsl<-ggsurvplot(
  survfit(Surv(as.numeric(AVALC), CNSR == "0") ~ ARMCD, data = fpfsl),
  data = fpfsl,
  risk.table = TRUE,
    pval = TRUE,
  title="Late Recurrence (n=144)",
  xlab = "Time (months)",
  ylab = "Progression Free Survival",
  # title = "Progression-Free Survival by Recurrence Status",
  legend.title = "",
  xlim = c(0, 60),
  break.time.by = 12,
  palette = um_colors,
  legend.labs = c(
    "Sunitinib",
    "Avelumab + Axitinib"
      ),
  surv.scale = "percent",
  ggtheme = theme_minimal(base_size = 14)
)

pfssubsupp <- plot_grid(
  pfsd$plot,
    pfse$plot,
  pfsd$table,
   pfse$table,
  pfsi$plot,pfsl$plot,
    pfsi$table,
   pfsl$table,
  ncol = 2,
    rel_heights = c(2.5, 1.2,2.5,1.2)
)

pfssub <- plot_grid(
  pfsde$plot,
    pfsil$plot,
  pfsde$table,
   pfsil$table,
  ncol = 2,
    rel_heights = c(2.5, 1)
)
pfssubforest <- plot_grid(
  pfssub,
  forestplot,
  ncol = 1,
    rel_heights = c(2, 1.5),rel_widths = c(1,1.5)
)

pfssubsupforest <- plot_grid(
  pfssubsupp,
  forestplot,
  ncol = 1,
    rel_heights = c(5, 1.5),rel_widths = c(1,1.5)
)

pfssubsupforest
pfssubforest

```


#Interaction Assessment
``` {r interaction assessment }

# assess for interaction by using a global interaction test, an ANOVA between the two models

#----------------------------------------------------
#1) PRIMARY 
#1) primary analysis sensitivity Assessment of recurrence timing as a continous variable among only recurrent patients (1 df)

fpfsrecur<-subset(fpfs,!fpfs$categories %in% "De Novo Metastatic")

# Reduced model
cox_no_int <- coxph(
    Surv(as.numeric(AVALC), CNSR == "0") ~ ARMCD + timetotrial + imdc,
    data = fpfsrecur
)

# Full model
cox_int <- coxph(
    Surv(as.numeric(AVALC), CNSR == "0") ~ ARMCD * timetotrial + imdc,
    data = fpfsrecur
)

# Global interaction test
anova(cox_no_int, cox_int)
#----------------------------------------------------
#2) Secondary biologic grouping: Assessment of recurrence timing as a binary variable (denovo|early vs int|late)

fpfs$comb<-fpfs$categories %in% c("De Novo Metastatic","early")

# Reduced model
cox_no_int <- coxph(
    Surv(as.numeric(AVALC), CNSR == "0") ~ ARMCD + comb + imdc,
    data = fpfs
)

# Full model
cox_int <- coxph(
    Surv(as.numeric(AVALC), CNSR == "0") ~ ARMCD * comb + imdc,
    data = fpfs
)

# Global interaction test
anova(cox_no_int, cox_int)

#----------------------------------------------------
#3)  Interaction Analysis is Time to Recurrecne Continous (1 df)

# Reduced model
cox_no_int <- coxph(
    Surv(as.numeric(AVALC), CNSR == "0") ~ ARMCD + timetotrialinc + imdc,
    data = fpfs
)

# Full model
cox_int <- coxph(
    Surv(as.numeric(AVALC), CNSR == "0") ~ ARMCD * timetotrialinc + imdc,
    data = fpfs
)

# Global interaction test
anova(cox_no_int, cox_int) 



```

#ORR by recurrence category
``` {r ORR}

#ORR plot
# (Optional) set display order

finalorr<-subset(final,!final$orr %in% c("--redacted--","NOT EVALUABLE"))
cat_order  <- c( "De Novo Metastatic","early", "intermediate", "late")
orr_order  <- c( "COMPLETE RESPONSE", 
                "PARTIAL RESPONSE", "STABLE DISEASE", "PROGRESSIVE DISEASE")

df_prop <- finalorr %>%
  mutate(
    categories = factor(categories, levels = cat_order),
    orr        = factor(orr,        levels = orr_order)
  ) %>%
  count(categories, ARM, orr, name = "n") %>%
  group_by(categories, ARM) %>%
  mutate(prop = n / sum(n)) %>%
  ungroup()



# ORR (CR+PR) box (ymin at top of SD+PD, ymax at top of stack)
df_box <- df_prop %>%
  group_by(categories, ARM) %>%
  summarise(
    ymin = sum(prop[orr %in% c("STABLE DISEASE", "PROGRESSIVE DISEASE")]),
    ymax = ymin + sum(prop[orr %in% c("COMPLETE RESPONSE", "PARTIAL RESPONSE")]),
    .groups = "drop"
  ) %>%
  mutate(highlight = "ORR (CR + PR)")

# PD box (ymin at top of CR+PR+SD, ymax at end of PD)
df_box_pd <- df_prop %>%
  group_by(categories, ARM) %>%
  summarise(
    pd   = sum(prop[orr == "PROGRESSIVE DISEASE"]),
    ymin = 0,
    ymax = ymin + pd,
    .groups = "drop"
  ) %>%
  filter(pd > 0) %>%                        # skip zero-height rectangles
  mutate(highlight = "PD rate")
# --- Standard error for ORR and PD ---
df_counts <- df_prop %>%
  group_by(categories, ARM) %>%
  summarise(
    N     = sum(n),
    p_ORR = sum(n[orr %in% c("COMPLETE RESPONSE","PARTIAL RESPONSE")]) / N,
    p_PD  = sum(n[orr == "PROGRESSIVE DISEASE"]) / N,
    .groups = "drop"
  ) %>%
  mutate(
    se_ORR = sqrt(p_ORR * (1 - p_ORR) / N),
    se_PD  = sqrt(p_PD  * (1 - p_PD ) / N),
    
    # map ORR SE to the top-of-stack ORR box (same region as your ORR rectangle)
    ylow_ORR  = pmax(0, 1 - pmin(1, p_ORR + se_ORR)),
    yhigh_ORR = pmin(1, 1 - pmax(0, p_ORR - se_ORR)),
    
    # PD SE (two options):
    # 1) baseline-anchored (matches your current PD rectangle with ymin=0)
    ylow_PD_base  = pmax(0, p_PD - se_PD),
    yhigh_PD_base = pmin(1, p_PD + se_PD),
    
    # 2) top-of-stack (use if you change PD rectangle to sit on the PD segment)
    ylow_PD_top  = pmax(0, 1 - pmin(1, p_PD + se_PD)),
    yhigh_PD_top = pmin(1, 1 - pmax(0, p_PD - se_PD))
  )

# ---- Add the SE error bars to your existing plot ----

df_prop$categories <- factor(df_prop$categories,
                             levels = c("De Novo Metastatic","early","intermediate","late"),
                             labels = c("De Novo\nMetastatic",
```
