``` {r ORR}
                                        "Early\nRecurrent",
                                        "Intermediate\nRecurrent",
                                        "Late\nRecurrent"))
df_counts$categories <- factor(df_counts$categories,
                             levels = c("De Novo Metastatic","early","intermediate","late"),
                             labels = c("De Novo\nMetastatic",
                                        "Early\nRecurrent",
                                        "Intermediate\nRecurrent",
                                        "Late\nRecurrent"))

ORRPlot<-ggplot(
  df_prop,
  aes(x = categories, y = prop, fill = orr)
) +
  geom_col() +
  # ORR outline
  geom_rect(
    data = df_box,
    aes(
      xmin = as.numeric(categories) - 0.4,
      xmax = as.numeric(categories) + 0.4,
      ymin = ymin,
      ymax = ymax,
      color = highlight
    ),
    inherit.aes = FALSE,
    fill = NA,
    linewidth = 1.1,
    show.legend = TRUE
  ) +
  # PD outline (your current baseline version)
  geom_rect(
    data = df_box_pd,
    aes(
      xmin = as.numeric(categories) - 0.4,
      xmax = as.numeric(categories) + 0.4,
      ymin = ymin,
      ymax = ymax,
      color = highlight
    ),
    inherit.aes = FALSE,
    fill = NA,
    linewidth = 1.1,
    show.legend = TRUE
  ) +
  # ORR SE bars (top-of-stack region)
  geom_errorbar(
    data = df_counts %>% mutate(highlight = "ORR (CR + PR)"),
    aes(x = categories, ymin = ylow_ORR, ymax = yhigh_ORR, color = highlight),
    width = 0.15, linewidth = 0.9, inherit.aes = FALSE
  ) +
  # PD SE bars ŌĆö baseline-anchored to match your PD rectangle
  geom_errorbar(
    data = df_counts %>% mutate(highlight = "PD rate"),
    aes(x = categories, ymin = ylow_PD_base, ymax = yhigh_PD_base, color = highlight),
    width = 0.15, linewidth = 0.9, inherit.aes = FALSE
  ) +

  scale_y_continuous(labels = scales::label_percent(),breaks = seq(0, 1, 0.20)) +



  scale_color_manual(
    name = NULL,
    values = c("ORR (CR + PR)" = "black",
               "PD rate"        = "#d73027"),
    guide = guide_legend(
      override.aes = list(fill = NA, linewidth = 1.1),
      order = 2
    )
  ) +
  guides(fill = guide_legend(order = 1)) +
  labs(
    x = NULL, y = "Proportion of patients", fill = "Response",
    title = "Objective Response by Recurrence Timing and Treatment Arm"
  ) +
  facet_grid(. ~ ARM, switch = "x",
             labeller = labeller(
               ARM = as_labeller(c(
                 "Avelumab 10 mg/kg IV Q2W in a 6-week cycle + axitinib 5 mg PO BID" =
                   "Avelumab + Axitinib",
                 "Sunitinib 50 mg PO QD on Schedule 4/2" =
                   "Sunitinib"
               ))
             ))+
  theme_minimal(base_size = 12) +
  theme(
    legend.position = "right",
    strip.placement = "outside",
    strip.background = element_blank(),
    panel.grid.major.x = element_blank(),   # remove vertical major gridlines
    panel.grid.minor.x = element_blank(),   # remove vertical minor gridlines
    panel.grid.minor.y = element_line(color = "gray20", linewidth = 0.3), # keep horizontal minor
    panel.grid.major.y = element_line(color = "gray20")   
  )+
  scale_fill_manual(
  values = c(
    "COMPLETE RESPONSE"    = "#1a9850",
    "PARTIAL RESPONSE"     = "#a6d96a",
    "STABLE DISEASE"       = "#ffffbf",
    "PROGRESSIVE DISEASE"  = "#f46d43"
  )
)+
  geom_vline(xintercept = 4.7, linewidth = 0.8, color = "black")

ORRPlot

```
``` {r site and late recurrence}


angiosite<-ggplot(final, aes(x = timetotrial, y = angio,colour=sitespecclean)) +
    geom_point(alpha = 0.7)  +
    scale_x_continuous(
        breaks = c(0,60,120,180,240,300),
        labels = c("0","60","120","180","240",300)
    ) +  
    # scale_color_manual(
    #     values = c(
    #         "KIDNEY" = "#4d9221",
    #         "METASTASIS" = "#c51b7d"        ))+
    labs(
        x = "Recurrence Time (months)",
        y = "Angiogenesis",
        colour = "Sequencing\nSite"
    ) +
    coord_cartesian(ylim = c(-3,3), xlim = c(0,300)) +
    theme_minimal()+
    theme(legend.position="none")

cellcyclesite<-ggplot(final, aes(x = timetotrial, y = cellcycle,colour=sitespecclean)) +
    geom_point(alpha = 0.7)  +
    scale_x_continuous(
        breaks = c(0,60,120,180,240,300),
        labels = c("0","60","120","180","240",300)
    ) +  
    # scale_color_manual(
    #     values = c(
    #         "KIDNEY" = "#4d9221",
    #         "METASTASIS" = "#c51b7d"        ))+
    labs(
        x = "Recurrence Time (months)",
        y = "Cell Cycle",
        colour = "Sequencing\nSite"
    ) +
    coord_cartesian(ylim = c(-3,3), xlim = c(0,300)) +
    theme_minimal()

site25years <- plot_grid(
  angiosite,
  cellcyclesite,
  ncol = 2,
    rel_heights = c(1, 1),rel_widths = c(1,1.3)
)




fit <- lm(g15 ~ timetotrial + site, data = final)
# fit <- lm(emt ~ timetotrial + site, data = final)

summary(fit)
cbind(
  coef(fit),
  confint(fit)
)

fit_reduced <- lm(g15 ~ site, data = final[!is.na(final$timetotrial),])
anova(fit_reduced, fit, test= "LRT")


final$predg15<-predict(fit,newdata = final)

# final$partial_angio <- resid(fit) + coef(fit)["timetotrial"] * final$timetotrial

p_label <- "p = 0.065"

summary(fit)

g15cont <- ggplot(final, aes(x = timetotrialcut, y = g15,colour=site)) +
    geom_point(alpha = 0.7) +geom_line(aes(x=timetotrial,y=predg15),linewidth = 1.2) +
    annotate("text",
             x = 40,
             y = 2.2,
             label = p_label,
             hjust = 0,
             size = 4) +
    scale_x_continuous(
        breaks = c(0,30,60,90,120),
        labels = c("0","30","60","90",">120")
    ) +  
    scale_color_manual(
        values = c(
            "KIDNEY" = "#4d9221",
            "METASTASIS" = "#c51b7d"        ))+
    labs(
        x = "Recurrence Time (months)",
        y = "15 Gene Score",
        colour = "Sequencing\nSite"
    ) +
    coord_cartesian(ylim = c(-22,20), xlim = c(0,120)) +
    theme_minimal()



fit <- lm(emt ~ timetotrial + site, data = final)
# fit <- lm(emt ~ timetotrial + site, data = final)

summary(fit)
cbind(
  coef(fit),
  confint(fit)
)

fit_reduced <- lm(emt ~ site, data = final[!is.na(final$timetotrial),])
anova(fit_reduced, fit, test= "LRT")


final$predemt<-predict(fit,newdata = final)

# final$partial_angio <- resid(fit) + coef(fit)["timetotrial"] * final$timetotrial

p_label <- "p = 8e-7"

summary(fit)

emtcont <- ggplot(final, aes(x = timetotrialcut, y = emt,colour=site)) +
    geom_point(alpha = 0.7) +geom_line(aes(x=timetotrial,y=predemt),linewidth = 1.2) +
    annotate("text",
             x = 40,
             y = 2.2,
             label = p_label,
             hjust = 0,
             size = 4) +
    scale_x_continuous(
        breaks = c(0,30,60,90,120),
        labels = c("0","30","60","90",">120")
    ) +  
    scale_color_manual(
        values = c(
            "KIDNEY" = "#4d9221",
            "METASTASIS" = "#c51b7d"        ))+
    labs(
        x = "Recurrence Time (months)",
        y = "EMT Score",
        colour = "Sequencing\nSite"
    ) +
    coord_cartesian(ylim = c(-30,30), xlim = c(0,120)) +
    theme_minimal()

emtcont


fit <- lm(emt ~ categories_model + site, data = final)
cbind(
  coef(fit),
  confint(fit)
)

final$predemtcat<-predict(fit,newdata = final)
summary(fit)
# Reduced model (no recurrence timing)
fit_reduced <- lm(emt ~ site, data = final)
anova(fit_reduced, fit, test= "LRT")




calipers <- data.frame(
  group1 = c("late","late","late"),
  group2 = c("De Novo Metastatic","early","intermediate"),
  p = c(0.0007,8.3e-05,0.00012)
) |>
  filter(p < 0.05)



calipers$y.position <- c(17.1,20.5,23.9)
calipers$label <- sprintf("p = %.2g", calipers$p)


emtcat<-ggplot(final, aes(x = categories_plot, y = emt)) +
      geom_beeswarm(
    aes(color = site),size = 1.5,alpha=0.7,method="center")+
  geom_line(aes(y=predemtcat,group=site,colour=site),linewidth = 1.2)+
    geom_boxplot(outlier.shape = NA, alpha = 0.3, width = 0.6) +

    stat_pvalue_manual(
        calipers,
        label = "label",
        tip.length = 0.01
    ) +  
  scale_color_manual(
                 values = c(
                     "KIDNEY" = "#4d9221",
                     "METASTASIS" = "#c51b7d"
                 ))+
    scale_x_discrete(
        labels = c(
            "De Novo Metastatic" = "DeNovo",
            "early" = "Early",
            "intermediate" = "Intermediate",
            "late" = "Late"
        )
    ) +
    labs(
        x = NULL,
        y = "EMT",
  colour = "Sequencing\nSite"
    ) +
    coord_cartesian(ylim = c(-40, 40)) +
    theme_minimal()



fit <- lm(g15 ~ categories_model + site, data = final)
cbind(
  coef(fit),
  confint(fit)
)

final$predg15cat<-predict(fit,newdata = final)
summary(fit)
# Reduced model (no recurrence timing)
fit_reduced <- lm(g15 ~ site, data = final)
anova(fit_reduced, fit, test= "LRT")




calipers <- data.frame(
  group1 = c("late","late","late"),
  group2 = c("De Novo Metastatic","early","intermediate"),
  p = c(0.34,0.039,0.0043)
) |>
  filter(p < 0.05)



calipers$y.position <- c(15.1,17.5)
calipers$label <- sprintf("p = %.2g", calipers$p)


g15cat<-ggplot(final, aes(x = categories_plot, y = g15)) +
      geom_beeswarm(
    aes(color = site),size = 1.5,alpha=0.7,method="center")+
  geom_line(aes(y=predg15cat,group=site,colour=site),linewidth = 1.2)+
    geom_boxplot(outlier.shape = NA, alpha = 0.3, width = 0.6) +

    stat_pvalue_manual(
        calipers,
        label = "label",
        tip.length = 0.01
    ) +  
  scale_color_manual(
                 values = c(
                     "KIDNEY" = "#4d9221",
                     "METASTASIS" = "#c51b7d"
                 ))+
    scale_x_discrete(
        labels = c(
            "De Novo Metastatic" = "DeNovo",
            "early" = "Early",
            "intermediate" = "Intermediate",
            "late" = "Late"
        )
    ) +
    labs(
        x = NULL,
        y = "15 Gene Score",
  colour = "Sequencing\nSite"
    ) +
    coord_cartesian(ylim = c(-22, 20)) +
    theme_minimal()

g15emtcomb <- plot_grid(
  g15cont,g15cat,
  emtcont,emtcat,
  ncol = 2,
    rel_heights = c(1, 1),rel_widths = c(1,1)
)



```
